En: THAT IS RIGHT. YOU CANNOT WITHSTAND THE WASTE LAND OF REALITY.
Zh: “没错，你根本无法与现实的荒原抗衡。”

En: IT IS MY TASK TO KEEP THE DEGENERATE DRUNKS FROM ENTERING THE HARBOUR.
Zh: “我的任务就是不让那些劣等的醉汉进入港口。”

En: ARE YOU ADMIRING MY MORPHOPHYSIOLOGY? A ripple of muscle passes underneath his skin. He lets you look.
Zh: “你是在欣赏我的形态生理状态吗？”他皮肤下的肌肉泛起波纹。他让你看个够。

En: STOP IT. YOU ARE EMBARRASSING YOURSELF IN FRONT OF THIS WOMAN, AND YOUR PAEDOMORPHIC FRIEND.
Zh: “够了。你这样只会让自己在这个女人、还有你身边低幼态的朋友面前丢脸。”

En: Say nothing, size him up first.
Zh: 什么也不说，先目测一下他的块头。

En: YOUR BODY BETRAYS YOUR DEGENERACY.
Zh: “你的身形暴露了你的低劣。”

En: Yeah, Measurehead, his body totally betrays his degeneracy, the young woman at the giant's side agrees.
Zh: “是的，测颅先生，他的身体彻底暴露了他的低劣，”大块头身边的年轻女子表示赞同。

En: We don't have time to get into this now. [Leave.]
Zh: “我们现在没时间理会这个。”[离开。]

En: YOUR RACE DESCENT HAS ONLY *WORSENED* SINCE I LAST SAW YOU -- YOU HAVE REALLY LET YOURSELF GO.
Zh: “比起我上次见你的时候，你的种族血统居然变得*更劣等*了——你真的太放纵自己了。”

En: Things are not as bad as they look. Sure, you have high blood pressure from metabolizing heroic quantities of ethanol. But you are robustly built. You will survive.
Zh: 事情其实并没有看起来那么糟糕。诚然，巨量乙醇的代谢导致了你的高血压，不过你的体格还算健壮。你死不了的。

En: You hear your heart pumping, fast and irregular. Your joints ache and you feel old... but still alive, somehow.
Zh: 你听见自己的心跳，又快又不规则。你有关节痛，然后感到自己老了……但不管怎么说，你还活着。

En: Merely standing up makes you sweat profusely. Your breathing is erratic. Your own heartbeat in your ears grows frantic and you feel your blood pressure rise.
Zh: 光是这么站着就让你冷汗直流。你的呼吸开始紊乱，鼓膜中传来的心跳声越来越狂乱，你感觉自己的血压正在飙升。

En: I CAN SEE YOU WERE ONCE AN ATHLETE. THEN DETERIORATED IN YOUR TWENTIES. IT IS TYPICAL OF YOUR HAPLOGROUP. LET'S BLAME THE FAILED EDUCATION SYSTEM AND LENIENCY TOWARD DEGENERATES IN YOUR HOMELAND.
Zh: “我可以看出来，你以前是一名运动员，然后在20多岁的时候就堕落了。对于你所属的单倍群来说，这种情况非常典型。这一切都是因为你们这个国家教育体制的失败，以及对肉体堕落的宽容吧。”

En: Your body does *not* betray your degeneracy, that's a lie. You're in great shape.
Zh: 你的身体*才没有*暴露你的劣等，他在扯淡。你的身材好得不得了。

En: My body does *not* betray my degeneracy!
Zh: “我的身体*没有*暴露我的劣等！”

En: What do you mean, my body betrays my degeneracy?
Zh: “你说我的身体暴露了我的低劣是什么意思？”

En: My body is unimportant. I'm with the police and I have police business with you.
Zh: “我的身体不重要。我是警察，有些工作上的事要找你。”

En: My body is unimportant. I'm with the police and we need to get that corpse down from the tree.
Zh: “我的身体不重要。我是警察，我们需要把尸体从树上弄下来。”

En: My body is unimportant. I'm with the police and we need to interview the Union boss regarding a murder investigation.
Zh: “我的身体不重要。我是警察，正在调查一起凶杀案，需要找工会老大问几句话。”

En: My body is unimportant.
Zh: “我的身体并不重要。”

En: IT MUST BE FRIGHTENING TO STAND IN THE SHADOW OF THIS *RACIAL PINNACLE*. BE CALM, HAM SANDWICH. YOU ARE NOT IN DANGER, BECAUSE YOU ARE NOT A THREAT TO ME.
Zh: “站在*种族巅峰*的阴影下一定很可怕吧。莫慌，火腿三明治先生。你没危险，因为你对我来说算不上是威胁。”

En: THAT IS PRECISELY THE NEGLIGENCE THAT HAS LED YOU TO SUCCUMB TO *AL GUL*. His face contorts in disgust, as if he were smelling a dead rat.
Zh: “正是因为你对自己身体状况的忽视导致你屈服于*己戊*。”他的脸庞因为厌恶而扭曲，像是嗅到了死老鼠的味道。

En: Puff out your chest, still say nothing.
Zh: 挺起胸膛，仍然不发一言。

En: WHAT IS THIS *ANDROGYNOUS* DISPLAY OF SEXUAL MATURITY? He looks down at you, taking stock of your physique.
Zh: “这种*半阴不阳*的性成熟展示方式是什么意思？”他低头看着你，评估着你的体格。

En: Khm...
THIS DISPLAY OF WEAKNESS MAY APPEAL TO OLDER WOMEN, WITH A STRONGER MATERNAL INSTINCT -- BUT IT IS A LIABILITY, HERE ON *BATTLEFIELD MARTINAISE*.
Zh: “像你这般示弱也许能对母性本能更强的年长女性产生吸引力——不过在*战场般的马丁内斯*，这很不利。”

En: Jean-Luc, his body is betraying his degeneracy pretty hard... She holds her nose. "Maybe you can ask him to leave?"
Zh: “让·卢克，他的身体严重暴露了他的低劣……”她捏住鼻子。“你可不可以让他离开这儿？”

En: Wait, uhm... *Al Gul*?
You're right, I'm an alcoholic. Now, I need you to cooperate with me.
Zh: “你说得对，我是个酒鬼。现在，我需要你的配合。”

En: You're right, I'm an alcoholic. And I need that dead body to no longer be in the tree.
Zh: “你说得对，我是个酒鬼。而且我需要把那具尸体从树上弄下来。”

En: You're right, I'm an alcoholic. Now, I need to enter the harbour.
Zh: “你说得对，我是个酒鬼。现在，我需要进入港口。”

En: You're right. I'm a servant of Al Gul. I still need you to respect The Law.
Zh: “你说得对。我是己戊的奴仆，不过我还是需要你遵纪守法。”

En: You're right. I'm a servant of Al Gul, but I still need that body down from the tree.
Zh: “你说得对。我是己戊的奴仆，不过我还是需要把尸体从树上弄下来。”

En: You're right. I'm a servant of Al Gul, but I still need to enter the harbour.
Zh: “你说得对。我是己戊的奴仆，但我还是需要进入港口。”

En: YOUR BODY CONTINUES TO BETRAY YOUR DEGENERACY.
Zh: “你的身体仍在继续暴露你的劣等。”

En:
YES -- *AL GUL*.	“是的——*己戊*。”
0x010000450001E440	Dialogue Text	GATES / MEASUREHEAD	Measurehead	YOU HAVE SUCCUMBED TO *AL GUL*." His face contorts in disgust -- as if he were smelling a dead rat.
Zh: “你向*己戊*屈服了。”他的脸庞因为厌恶而扭曲——就像嗅到了死老鼠的味道。

En: YOU REEK OF IT. AN INVISIBLE SWORD OF *AL GUL* EMERGES FROM YOUR THROAT. YOU CANNOT SEE IT, BUT OTHERS CAN. IT IS MAKING THE WOMAN IN MY COMPANY SICK.
Zh: “你身上满是那股恶臭，*己戊*就像一把隐形的剑从你的喉咙里穿了出来。你看不见，但是其他人可以。它让我身边的女人觉得恶心。”

En: THIS IS A FABRICATION THE AL-CHEMISTS OF YEESUT AND BASHIR AND THEIR GOLEM, AL GUL, HAVE FED YOUR PEOPLE. GO ON BELIEVING IN IT, *RACE LOSER*.
Zh: “这是伊苏特和贝希尔的炼金术师以及他们的魔像的造物——己戊，喂饱了你的民族。继续相信它吧，*废物种族*。”

En: Do you mean alcohol?
Zh: “你的意思是酒？”

En: But what *is* Al Gul?
Zh: “但是己戊*是*什么？”

En: CORRECT, MY SMALL-SKULLED SERVANT. He nods approvingly.
Zh: “没错，我的小颅骨奴仆。”他赞许地点点头。

En: He means *alcohol*.
Zh: 他的意思是*酒*。

En: AL GUL IS AN ANCIENT IILMARAAN POISON, A PARASITIC FUNGUS THAT HAS COLONIZED YOUR RACE. IT IS A TRICK THE DESERT PYGMEES PLAYED ON YOU -- FOR HUMILIATING THEM AND STRIPPING THEM OF THEIR LAND.
Zh: “己戊是一种古老的伊尔玛毒药，是殖民了你们整个种族的一种寄生真菌。这是沙漠侏儒对你们的复仇——你们欺侮过他们，还掠夺了他们的土地。”

En: Intentionally fermented drinks have existed for ten thousand years...
Zh: 人工发酵饮品已经存在了一万年……

En: The Iilmaraan people did not invent alcohol. It's existed since the neolithic.
Zh: “酒精不是伊尔玛人发明的，从新石器时代起酒就已经存在了。”

En: You mean alcohol?
Zh: “你说的是酒吗？”

En: This explains everything.
Zh: “这样一切都能解释通了。”

En: I don't think that's how history works.
Zh: “我记得历史书上不是这么写的。”

En: That's probably right, yes.
Zh: “也许是对的，没错。”

En: WHY DON'T YOU HAVE ANOTHER DRINK? YOUR FEATURES ARE NOT YET CONGENITALLY DEFORMED ENOUGH.
Zh: “你为什么不再喝一杯呢？你的体貌特征还够不上先天性畸形的标准呢。”

En: Oh yeah, Measurehead... The babe looks at him with eyes full of admiration that transcends the merely sexual.
Zh: “是啊，测颅先生……”女孩看着他，眼里满是超越了纯粹肉欲的仰慕之情。

En: This is going well for Measurehead.
Zh: 测颅先生这边好像挺顺利的。

En: GOOD, THERE IS A *FRITTTE* NEARBY. CONGRATULATE YOURSELF WITH ANOTHER DRINK. YOUR FEATURES ARE NOT YET CONGENITALLY DEFORMED ENOUGH.
Zh: “很好，附近有一家*弗利多*，再来一杯为自己庆祝庆祝吧。你的体貌特征还不够先天畸形的标准呢。”

En: CORRECT, MY SMALL-SKULLED SERVANT. He nods approvingly.
Zh: “没错，我的小骷髅奴仆。”他赞许地点点头。

En: NO, YOU DON'T, YOU NEED TO GET ANOTHER DRINK; OCCIDENTAL HAPLOGROUP B4 IS DONE GIVING ORDERS AROUND HERE. THE INFLUENCE OF THE *HAM SANDWICH RACE* IS WANING.
Zh: “不，你不需要进港口，你需要再来一杯。现在已经轮不到奥西登单倍群B4发号施令了，*火腿三明治种族*的影响力正在江河日下。”

En: YOUR MOUTH MOVES, BUT THE ONE WHO SPEAKS IS AL GUL. YOU ARE BUT A VESSEL FOR THE GHOUL NOW. VERY LITTLE OF YOUR SELF REMAINS.
Zh: “虽然在动的是你的嘴巴，但说话的其实是己戊。现在的你不过是一具行尸走肉罢了，只剩下很小一部分自我还残留着。”

En: Understood.
Zh: “明白了。”

En: I DOUBT IT, MY MICROCEPHALIC RACE SERVANT.
Zh: “我表示怀疑，我的小颅种族仆人。”

En: (Smell your breath.) "Kim, is it really so bad?"
Zh: （闻闻你自己的口气。）“金，真有那么难闻吗？”

En: It's not good.
Zh: “是不好闻。”

En: It's like a rat crawled into your stomach, got drunk and drowned.
Zh: 闻起来就像一只老鼠爬进了你的胃袋，那只老鼠喝醉后就直接溺死了在里面了。

En: Enough. I need you take down the dead body or let me in.
Zh: “够了。我需要你把尸体放下来，要不然就放我们进去。”

En: Enough. I need you to open the door to the harbour.
Zh: “够了。我需要你打开港口的大门。”

En: This has nothing to do with why I'm here.
Zh: “我来这里可不是为了这个的。”

En: YOUR LIFE AND THE LIFE OF YOUR RACE REVOLVE AROUND *AL GUL*. IT HAS EVERYTHING TO DO WITH WHY YOU'RE HERE.
Zh: “你个人以及整个种族的生命都围绕着*己戊*为中心转动。你出现在这里与己戊息息相关。”

En: SERVITUDE TO AL GUL DOES NOT EXPLAIN *EVERYTHING*. THERE ARE OTHER REASONS FOR YOUR RACE DESCENT.
Zh: “屈服于己戊不能解释*一切*。你们种族衰落还有其他原因。”

En: YOU GAVE THE WORLD *EUGENICS*, ELECTRICITY, AND POWERFUL WEAPONS OF WAR LIKE MISSILES AND AEROSTATIC AIRCRAFT. YOU MADE GREAT GAINS IN METALLURGY, RACE THEORY, AND STATECRAFT.
Zh: “你们给这个世界带来了*优生学*，电力，还有导弹、静风舰等等强大的战争武器。你们靠着冶金学、种族理论以及政治学获取了巨大的利益。”

En: NO. He cranes his head. "I HAVE HEARD ABOUT IT. ON THE RADIO."
Zh: “不。”他抬高头。“这些是我听来的。从收音机里。”

En: So, you *did* come from the islands?
Zh: “所以，你*真的*是从岛上来的？”

En: So... you did *not* come from the islands?
Zh: “所以……你*不是*从岛上来的？”

En: I AM A DESCENDANT. THE NARROW STREETS OF ULUNBUIR ARE WITH ME IN MY GENETIC DREAMS, I SEE YOUNG SEMENESE WOMEN WALK INTO THE GREY MASS ON *ILE DU FANTÔME*, WAITING ON IMMACULATE CONCEPTION FROM THE PALE.
Zh: “我是那片岛屿的后裔。乌伦布尔的狭窄街道在我遗传自先祖的梦中与我同在，我看见年轻的萨马拉女子步入*幽灵岛*的灰色空间，等待着灰域的无暇感孕。”

En: So you were born and raised on the islands, before you moved to Revachol?
Zh: “所以你在岛上出生长大，后来才来了瑞瓦肖？”

En: It is, baby, yeah. You know it!
Zh: “是的，宝贝，没错。你知道的！”

En: YOU DOMINATED LESSER CULTURES -- LIKE THE DEFORMED HIMEANS AND THE INEXPLICABLY POTATO-OBSESSED KOJKOS -- BUT NOW YOUR ASCENT TO THE GENETIC SUMMIT HAS HALTED. YOU ARE OBSESSED WITH SADNESS AND WITH FRIVOLOUS POP CULTURE.
Zh: “你们征服了劣等文明——比如畸形的希米恩人和莫名痴迷于土豆的克吉克人——而如今你们停下了攀登遗传学高峰的脚步，反倒流连于感伤的情绪以及轻佻的流行文化之中。”

En: BRING YOUR TROOPS TO THE SEMENINE ISLANDS AND TO BOOGIE STREET AND WE WILL PULVERIZE YOU. WHEN YOU ARE GONE WE WILL BUILD A MUSEUM FOR YOU.
Zh: “带着你们的军队朝塞美尼群岛和布吉街进发吧，我们会把你们碾成齑粉。等你们灭绝之后，我们会为你们建一座博物馆。”

En: THE WALLS WILL BE LINED WITH BOTTLES OF *AL GUL* -- YOUR BELOVED BEVERAGE. INSIDE WE WILL STORE THE ODES TO HOMO-SEXUALITY YOU CALL ART AND YOUR MICROCEPHALIC SKULLS.
Zh: “我们会在陈列柜里摆放一排又一排的*己戊*——你们最爱的饮料——的瓶子，瓶子里则装着被你们称之为艺术的对同性恋的颂歌以及你们小到畸形的颅骨。”

En: I don't have a problem with Al Gul. I just drink a little on the weekends.
Zh: “我没有己戊方面的问题。我只是会在周末小酌一杯。”

En: Show him the ham still got it!
Zh: 让他看看，火腿还是有两把刷子的！

En: Does this remind you of someone? The guy down there...
Zh: 这有没有让你想起某个人？就是底下的那个家伙……

En: That fat racist over there... (Point to the racist lorryman.) You're just him after pumping some iron.
Zh: “那边那个种族主义胖子……（指向那个种族主义卡车司机。）你不过就是撸过铁之后的他。”

En: Actually, I think the ham sandwich race still has it in them.
Zh: “其实，我觉得火腿三明治种族还是有希望的。”

En: I am the police and I need you to comply -- now! (Take a step closer.)
Zh: “我是警察，我需要你服从指令——现在！”（上前一步。）

En: The race stuff is unimportant here -- I just need you to help me do my job, please.
Zh: “种族什么的不重要——我只需要你配合一下我的工作，拜托了。”

En: LOOK AT MY CRANIOLOGY. I AM THE PINNACLE OF MY HAPLOGROUP. THE PINK BLOB IS A BAD EXAMPLE EVEN OF YOURS. IT SADDENS ME... He pauses in melancholy reflection. "YOU WERE ONCE A NOBLE AND POWERFUL RACE."
Zh: “看看我的头骨，我是我们单倍群的巅峰。那团粉色的肉块就算是以你们种族的标准来看都嫌嗑碜。这让我感到悲哀……”他停下来，忧郁地沉思着。“你们曾经是高贵而又强大的种族。”

En: WILLINGLY CALLING YOURSELF A HAM SANDWICH. HOW FAR THE OCCIDENTAL HAPLOGROUP HAS FALLEN... He pauses in melancholy reflection. "YOU WERE ONCE A NOBLE AND POWERFUL RACE."
Zh: “居然心甘情愿管自己叫火腿三明治。奥西登单倍群到底堕落到了怎样的地步……”他停下来，忧郁地沉思着。“你们曾经是高贵而又强大的种族。”

En: JERKING MOTIONS. SIGNS OF A LATE-STAGE NEURODEGENERATIVE DISORDER. HOW FAR THE OCCIDENTAL HAPLOGROUP HAS FALLEN... He pauses in melancholy reflection. "YOU WERE ONCE A NOBLE AND POWERFUL RACE."
Zh: “猝然的动作，这是神经退化症晚期的信号。奥西登单倍群到底堕落到了怎样的地步……”他停下来，忧郁地沉思着。“你们曾经是高贵而又强大的种族。”

En: BEGGING FOR HELP. ATTEMPTING TO PASS FEAR FOR COOPERATION. HOW FAR THE OCCIDENTAL HAPLOGROUP HAS FALLEN... He pauses in melancholy reflection. "YOU WERE ONCE A NOBLE AND POWERFUL RACE."
Zh: “你在乞求协助，试图通过合作来逃避恐惧。奥西登单倍群到底堕落到了怎样的地步……”他停下来，忧郁地沉思着。“你们曾经是高贵而又强大的种族。”

En: OCCIDENTAL HAPLOGROUP B4 IS DONE GIVING ORDERS AROUND HERE. THE INFLUENCE OF THE *HAM SANDWICH RACE* IS WANING.
Zh: “这里已经轮不到奥西登单倍群B4发号施令了。*火腿三明治种族*的影响力正江河日下。”

En: First, let me make this clear: I'm not a drunk. I'm a cop. I just have a drink every now and then, everyone does.
Zh: “先让我声明一点：我不是醉汉，我是警察。我只是偶尔喝上一杯，跟所有人一样。”

En: THE ETHANOL FUNGUS IS DEEP WITHIN YOUR NERVOUS SYSTEM, PULLING THE STRINGS. YOU ARE MERELY ITS *PUPA* NOW. I SEE NO HOPE FOR YOU OR YOUR KIND.
Zh: “乙醇真菌已经严重侵入了你的神经系统，操纵着你的一言一行，现在的你不过是它的*蚕蛹*。我在你以及你的种族身上看不到任何希望。”

En: There is a button right behind him, just out of reach... it must be the one that opens the door to the harbour.
Zh: 他身后有一个按钮，就在你伸手可及的范围……这一定就是那个控制港口大门的按钮。

En: This man is not budging. Let's hope his superiors inside are more cooperative.
Zh: 男人纹丝未动。祈祷港口里面那位上级能更合作一些吧。

En: You're right about all this. Now I just need you to cooperate with me as a police officer.
Zh: “你说的都对。现在我只需要你配合警方办案。”

En: You're right about all this. Now I need you to help me get that corpse down from the tree.
Zh: “你说的都对。现在我只需要你帮我把尸体从树上弄下来。”

En: You're right about all this. Now I just need you to let me go into the harbour.
Zh: “你说的都对。现在我只需要你放我进港口。”

En: The situation is serious. Your people have probably killed a man.
Zh: “现在情况很严重。你们的人可能杀了个人。”

En: It was your people who put that dead body up there. Your people should help me get it down.
Zh: “既然是你们的人先把那具尸体挂上去的，那也应该由你们派人帮我把尸体放下来。”

En: The situation is serious. Your people have probably killed a man. I need to talk to your boss.
Zh: “现在情况很严重。你们的人可能杀了个人。我要跟你老大谈谈。”

En: This is going nowhere. [Leave.]
Zh: “这样行不通的。”[离开。]

En: LAST WE SAW, YOUR RACE WAS BEING SUPERSEDED BY THE SEMENESE.
Zh: “我们都知道，你所在的种族的地位即将被塞美尼人取代。”

En: YOU WILL BE SUPERSEDED -- ISN'T THAT RIGHT, BABE?
Zh: “你们终将被取代——我说得对吗，宝贝？”

En: ENOUGH WITH THIS BEGGING. YOU SHOULD LEAVE THE STAGE OF HISTORY WITH DIGNITY -- BY INVITING THE OTHER RACES TO A *GREAT WORLD WAR*.
Zh: “别再求我了，你们应该以一种体面的方式退出历史舞台——比如邀请其他种族加入一场*世界大战*。”

En: No, there's a peaceful solution. You could *internalize* Measurehead's race theory. He would take you as one of his own.
Zh: 不，一定存在非暴力的解决的方案。你可以*内化*测颅先生的种族理论，然后他就会把你当成自己人。

En: There may be a peaceful solution to this. You could *internalize* Measurehead's race theory. He would take you as one of his own.
Zh: 一定存在非暴力的解决的方案。你可以*内化*测颅先生的种族理论，然后他就会把你当成自己人。

En: Right. Good idea.
Zh: 没错。好主意。

En: Wouldn't that mean I have to become a Semenese supremacist myself?
Zh: 那不就意味着我自己也要变成一个塞美尼至上主义者？

En: But I already subscribe to one race theory, won't they conflict each other?
Zh: 但是我已经拥有一种种族理论了，它们俩不会互相冲突吗？

En: The *down with racism* thing? That's basic race theory. This is way above that. *Way*.
Zh: 货车司机那一套吗？那是很基础的种族理论，而现在这个要比那一套高到不知道哪里去了。

En: Well, not as such. What you do with a mastery of advanced race theory is up to you. You could reject the findings, sure -- or accept them and become an *advanced* racist.
Zh: 嗯，并不如此。想要如何使用先进的种族主义理论是你的事。你也可以拒绝你的成果。当然——也可以接受它，并成为一名*先进的*种族主义者。

En: The *best* idea.
Zh: *完美*。

En: I like the punching idea more.
Zh: 我更喜欢直接开打的方案。

En: Do it! Now!
Zh: 上吧！就是现在！

En: Isn't Evrart, the Union boss, white?
Zh: “艾弗拉特，那个工会老大，他不是白人吗？”

En: You serve the Union, don't you? Aren't they... white?
Zh: “你在给工会做事，对吗？他们不是……白人吗？”

En: RACISTS ARE GENERALLY NOT VERY GOOD EXAMPLES OF THEIR RACE. He gestures toward the lorryman down the street...
Zh: “种族主义者一般都不是自己所属种族最好的样本。”他指了指街上那个货车司机……

En: There must be *some* friction there. He's keeping it well hidden, however...
Zh: 他们之间肯定*有些*摩擦，不过他掩饰得倒挺好……

En: You keep telling yourself that.
Zh: “你就继续这样不停地跟自己重复吧。”

En: I'm sorry, of course. I understand now. Deeper.
Zh: “抱歉，我现在能理解了，而且更深入了。”

En: ALSO -- TO SERVE IS NOBLE, IT TAKES DISCIPLINE. YOUR PETULANT INDIVIDUALISM HAS ONLY CONTRIBUTED TO YOUR *RACE FAILURE*. IT IS LAX AND MORONIC.
Zh: “还有——服务他人是高尚的，这需要纪律。你们任性的个人主义只会导致你们的*种族衰败*，个人主义意味着散漫和低能。”

En: JAM. INDIVIDUALISM. YOU HAVE GOTTEN THESE IDEAS FROM DEGENERATE YOUTH CULTURE, HAVE YOU NOT? YOU HAVE PICKED THEM UP FROM ROCK AND ROLL SONGS?
Zh: “菜。个人主义。这些词是你从低等的青年文化中学来的吧？摇滚歌曲？”

En: MR. CLAIRE IS A MAN OF VISION AND MEANS. HE HAS THE WILL TO CONFRONT INTERNATIONAL CAPITAL -- SOMETHING *YOUR* RACE NAIVISTIC COMMUNISTS NEVER DID.
Zh: “克莱尔先生是一个有远见、有手段的男人。他拥有足够的意志力去跟国际资本叫板——那恰恰是*你的*种族*里那些天真的康米主义者从未能企及的。”

En: MR. CLAIRE IS A MAN OF VISION AND MEANS. HE HAS THE WILL TO CONFRONT POLYCULTURAL CAPITAL -- SOMETHING *YOUR* RACE NAIVISTIC COMMUNISTS NEVER DID.
Zh: “克莱尔先生是一个有远见、有手段的男人。他拥有足够的意志力去跟多元文化资本叫板——那恰恰是*你的*种族*里那些天真的康米主义者从未能企及的。”

En: MR. CLAIRE IS A MAN OF VISION AND MEANS. HE HAS THE WILL TO CONFRONT INTERNATIONAL CAPITAL, WHICH IS SOMETHING YOUR RACE NAIVISTIC COMMUNISTS NEVER DID.
Zh: “克莱尔先生是一个有远见、有手段的男人。他拥有足够的意志力去跟国际资本叫板，那恰恰是*你的*种族*里那些天真的康米主义者从未能企及的。”

En: Communism is pretty cool.
Zh: “康米主义挺酷的啊。”

En: Individualism is my jam.
Zh: “个人主义是我的菜。”

En: Enough of this.
Zh: “够了。”

En: IDIOTIC COMMUNISM IS THE SINGLE GREATEST CONTRIBUTOR TO YOUR RACE DESCENT. EVERYWHERE AROUND YOU, THE FRUITS OF ITS FAILURE TO CHALLENGE THE WORLD ORDER: INDIVIDUALISM, ROCK AND ROLL MUSIC, SEXUALLY TRANSMITTED DISEASES...
Zh: “愚蠢的康米主义对你们种族的遗传造成了无可比拟的影响。你周围到处都是它挑战世界秩序未遂后结出的果实：个人主义，摇滚乐，性病……”

En: ABOVE ALL -- RAMPANT MULTINATIONAL FINANCE STILL REIGNING LARGE. TELL ME, WHERE HAVE YOU GOTTEN YOUR LOVE OF PATHETIC COMMUNISM FROM? He leans closer. "DEGENERATE YOUTH CULTURE? ROCK AND ROLL MUSIC?"
Zh: “但不管怎么说——猖獗的跨国财团仍然占据着支配地位。告诉我，你对可悲的康米主义的热爱从何而来？”他靠近了一些。“低等的青年文化？摇滚乐？”

En: I'm no communist.
Zh: “我不是康米主义者。”

En: He looks toward the harbour, motionless. The tattoos on his face like a web of stone.
Zh: 他一动不动地看着港口的方向，脸上的纹身像是一张石头构成的网络。

En: OF COURSE YOU ARE, REVACHOLIAN MAN. THE FAILURE OF COMMUNISM TO CHALLENGE THE WORLD ORDER IS THE CORE OF YOUR RACE FATE. ALL AROUND YOU, THE FRUITS OF ITS DEFEAT: INDIVIDUALISM, ROCK AND ROLL MUSIC, SEXUALLY TRANSMITTED DISEASE...
Zh: “你怎么不是了，瑞瓦肖人。康米主义挑战世界秩序的失败象征着你们种族命运的核心。革命失败结出的恶果在你周围到处可见：个人主义，摇滚乐，性病……”

En: What are those tattoos of yours supposed to mean?
Zh: “你身上这些纹身是什么意思？”

En: I AM NOT LIKE THEM. I AM CRANIOMETRIC PERFECTION. I HAVE TAKEN THE TROUBLE TO PERMANENTLY DRAW A PHRENOLOGIC GRID ON MY SKULL AND FEATURES. THIS SHOULD DISPEL ANY DOUBT.
Zh: “我跟他们不一样，我在颅骨测量学标准上是完美的。我花了点力气在我的头骨和脸上画下了永久的骨相网格，这样一来针对我的所有质疑都会不攻自破。”

En: DON'T BE VULGAR. WHITE OR NOT HAS GOT LITTLE TO DO WITH THIS. THE *RACE ENIGMA* RUNS MUCH DEEPER THAN THAT. He turns his eyes towards the harbour, seemingly bored with you.
Zh: “不要这么庸俗，肤色白不白并不重要，*种族之谜*要比肤色深奥得多。”他看向港口，看起来已经对你感到厌倦了。

En: Welcome to Revachol! you hear him yell at a red-head woman visiting the Frittte nearby.
Zh: ‘欢迎来到瑞瓦肖！’你听见那个司机正朝着一个正准备推门进弗利多的红发女人大喊。

En: He must think red-heads are immigrants.
Zh: 他肯定以为所有红头发的都是移民吧。

En: I have gotten it from disco, actually.
Zh: “其实我是从迪斯科里学来的。”

En: It's true, I am a rock and roll star and a rebel.
Zh: “我其实是个摇滚明星，一个叛逆者。”

En: Youth culture does not affect my thinking.
Zh: “青年文化对我的想法没有任何影响。”

En: OFFSHOOTS OF THE SEMENESE PEOPLE INVENTED DISCO WHILE HAVING SEX UNDER THE INFLUENCE OF COCAINE. IT IS A SHAME UPON MY RACE -- BUT WHAT IS DONE IS DONE.
Zh: “塞美尼人中的一支曾在可卡因的作用下乱性，在交媾的过程中他们发明了迪斯科。这是我们种族之耻——但是木已成舟。”

En: I AM NOT SURPRISED YOU ENJOY IT SO MUCH. THIS HAS HAPPENED TO MANY OF THE SIDE-PRODUCTS OF THE INEVITABLE CULTURAL VICTORY OF THE SEMENESE RACE.
Zh: “我毫不意外你会这么喜欢迪斯科。塞美尼种族的文化战无不胜，必将生成很多这一类能让其他族群沉迷其中的副产品。”

En: The drawings are precise and look true to their pseudoscientific ambitions. One thing however -- it is not *entirely* free of throwbacks in the phylogenetic tree. His large jaw, for example, could be a trait indicative of criminalism. Also his ear lobes could be smaller.
Zh: 纹身图案的细节非常严谨，看起来很是符合这些人在伪科学上的追求。不过值得一提的是——他也没有*完全*避免在种系树上的倒退。比如说，他宽大的下巴可能就是一种犯罪倾向的表征，另外他的耳垂也偏大了一点。

En: SO IT WAS. YOU BESTED ME IN RACE COMBAT TO REACH MY SUPERIOR, THEN HAD HIM GIVE ME AN ORDER. I SALUTE YOUR CUNNING, ENEMY. I WILL GO AND REMOVE THE BODY FROM THE TREE -- WITH MY BARE HANDS.
Zh: “原来如此。你通过直接与我的上级接触而在种族竞赛中打败了我，然后还让他给我下了一道命令。我向你的狡猾致敬，仇敌。我会去把树上那具尸体给弄下来的——徒手。”

En: SO IT WAS. YOU SURMOUNTED THE HARBOUR WALL IN A DISPLAY OF ATHLETIC PROWESS TO REACH MY SUPERIOR -- THEN HAD HIM GIVE ME AN ORDER. I SALUTE YOUR CUNNING AND I WILL REMOVE THE BODY FROM THE TREE -- WITH MY BARE HANDS.
Zh: “原来如此。你为了炫耀自己的运动能力而翻越了港口外的高墙，然后接触到了我的上级，还让他给我下了一道命令。我向你的狡猾致敬，仇敌。我会去把树上那具尸体给弄下来——徒手。”

En: You're so noble, Measurehead.
Zh: “阁下殊为可敬，测颅先生。”

En: There's a but.
Zh: 他要说但是了。

En: Lieutenant, what if we don't want to do that?
Zh: “警督，但是如果我们不打算这么做呢？”

En: This is the uncomfortable result of not taking it down ourselves. I can live with the compromise.
Zh: “既然我们没能靠自己把尸体弄下来，也就只好面对这样的窘境了。我个人可以接受向他求助。”

En: LISTEN TO YOUR LITTLE FRIEND. HE IS WISE IN HIS CHILDLIKE WAY. HIS MYSTERIOUS RACE MAY YET PROVE FIERCE COMPETITION TO MY HEROIC HAPLOGROUP.
Zh: “好好听听你这位小个子朋友的话吧，他以孩童般的方式展示了自己的聪明才智。他所属的那个神秘的种族也许终归还是可以与我们英雄的单倍群一战的。”

En: BABE, SEE THAT THEY STAY HERE THE WHOLE TIME.
Zh: “宝贝，一定要确保他们在这段时间一直乖乖留在这里。”

En: The woman's gaze follows Measurehead as he leaves...
Zh: 测颅先生离开的时候，女人的目光一直追随其后……

En: We're just trying to keep things from going to shit.
Zh: “我们只是不想让事情变得一团糟。”

En: Have you ever thought that maybe things *should* go to shit? The woman twirls her hair. "I'm Katya by the way..."
Zh: “你有没有想过，也许一切*本应*变得一团糟呢？”女人捻弄着自己的头发。“顺便说一句，我叫卡佳……”

En: That's none of your business.
Zh: “这与你无关。”

En: And who are you? The lieutenant fires back. "What is your business here? Why are your clothes four sizes too small for you?"
Zh: “你到底是谁？”警督回击道，“你在这里到底想干什么？为什么你身上的衣服比你实际的身材小了四个码？”

En: Spoken by a mercenary -- pretending to be a worker.
Zh: “一个假扮成工人的雇佣兵说的。”

En: There has been no side-choosing. We did what we had to do to keep order.
Zh: “这跟站队无关。我们做的一切都是为了维持秩序。”

En: Thank you for your cooperation, Measurehead.
Zh: “感谢你的配合，测颅先生。”

En: FAREWELL, HAM SANDWICH. YOU ARE A UNION MAN FROM NOW ON.
Zh: “再见了，火腿三明治。从现在开始，你就是工会的一员了。”

En: He nods slowly. "AND WHAT YOU HAD TO DO -- WAS TO BECOME A UNION MAN FOR ALL TO SEE."
Zh: 他慢慢点头。“你要做的——就是在众人的注视下成为工会的一员。”

En: ROCK AND ROLL IS MORIBUND, ONLY KOJKOS LISTEN TO IT ANYMORE. THERE IS NO LIFE LEFT IN IT, MY PEOPLE ABANDONED IT LONG AGO. IT LEADS ONLY TO NEUROGENERATIVE HERPES AND HEROIN OVERDOSES.
Zh: “摇滚乐已经过时了，只有克吉克人还在听那些玩意。这种音乐早已失去了生命力，我的族人早就不听了。它只会导致神经变性疱疹，还有海洛因摄取过量。”

En: OF COURSE IT DOES. YOU ARE A DEGENERATE INDIVIDUALIST AND A ROCK AND ROLL REBEL. A PAWN OF INTERNATIONAL FINANCE, JUST LIKE THE REST OF YOUR HAM-COLOURED RACE.
Zh: “怎么没有影响？你是一个低劣的个人主义者，摇滚叛逆者，国际金融大鳄的马前卒，跟你火腿色种族的其他成员一模一样。”

En: I said I'm *not* a communist. I don't know who I am but that's one thing I know.
Zh: “我觉得我*不是*康米主义者。我也不知道自己到底是什么，不过我很清楚自己不是康米主义者。”

En: STOP EXPLAINING YOURSELF, NO ONE CARES ABOUT YOUR BELIEFS. THE CONVERSATION HAS MOVED ON. TELL ME WHAT DEGENERATE SUB-CULTURE HAS MADE YOU DRESS IN THIS SHAMEFUL WAY?
Zh: “别再为自己辩解了，没人在乎你的看法。继续说下去，告诉我，是哪个低等的亚文化教会了你这种丢人的着装风格？”

En: Okay, I'll ask -- who are the *Semenese*?
Zh: “好吧，那我想问——*塞美尼人*是什么？”

En: I don't really know who the Semenese are. I've recently experienced head trauma.
Zh: “我真的不知道塞美尼人是什么。我的脑袋最近受过伤。”

En: Wonderful. I need to enter the harbour now -- or you could take the body down yourself maybe?
Zh: “很好。现在我需要进入港口——另外也许你可以自行前去把树上的尸体弄下来？”

En: Wonderful. I need to enter the harbour now -- on police business.
Zh: “太好了。现在我需要进入港口——我有公事在身。”

En: Wonderful. We're done with this line of inquiry.
Zh: “很好，这个话题就到此为止吧。”

En: Measurehead stoically looks to the distance -- in silence.
Zh: 测颅先生面无表情地看着远方——沉默不语。

En: WHAT YOU *NEED* IS TO COME TO TERMS WITH EXTINCTION -- AND NEVER GETTING THAT DEAD BODY DOWN FROM THE TREE. He looks at the button behind him and the tattoos on his face move to reveal the smallest of smiles.
Zh: “你真正*需要的*是跟种族的灭绝和解——以及跟自己永远都无法把尸体从树上取下来这一现实和解。”他看着身后的按钮，脸上微微颤动的纹身暴露了他那极不明显的笑容。

En: WHAT YOU *NEED* IS TO COME TO TERMS WITH EXTINCTION -- AND NEVER GETTING INTO THIS HARBOUR. He looks at the button behind him. The tattoos on his face move to reveal the smallest of smiles.
Zh: “你真正*需要的*是跟种族的灭绝和解——以及跟自己永远都无法进入港口这一现实和解。”他看着身后的按钮，脸上微微颤动的纹身暴露了他那极不明显的笑容。

En: I CAN SEE THAT. THE SEMENESE ARE THE SOUTH ISLAND RACE. HAPLOGROUP A4A, THE RIGHTFUL MASTERS OF THE INSULINDIAN ARCHIPELAGO. WE DESCEND FROM THE AREOPAGITES OF ANCIENT PERIKARNASSIS -- AND ARRIVED HERE 4000 YEARS AGO.
Zh: “塞美尼人是南岛种族，单倍群A4A，伊苏林迪群岛的合法主人。我们是古代佩里卡纳西斯的艾瑞奥帕吉特人后裔，4000年前迁移至此，比你们早了整整一千年。”

En: THE SOUTH ISLAND RACE, HAPLOGROUP A4A. WE ARE THE RIGHTFUL MASTERS OF THE INSULINDIAN ARCHIPELAGO. WE DESCEND FROM THE AREOPAGITES OF ANCIENT PERIKARNASSIS AND ARRIVED HERE 4000 YEARS AGO. MILLENNIA BEFORE YOU.
Zh: “南岛种族。单倍群A4A，伊苏林迪群岛的合法主人。我们是古代佩里卡纳西斯的艾瑞奥帕吉特人后裔，4000年前迁移至此，比你们早了整整一千年。”

En: WE ARE THE FUTURE. THAT IS ALL YOU NEED TO KNOW.
Zh: “我们才是未来。你只需要知道这个就可以了。”

En: Understood.
Zh: “明白了。”

En: GOOD.
Zh: “很好。”

En: So you're not really Semenese, you're just from Revachol.
Zh: “所以你并不是真正的塞美尼人，你只是个瑞瓦肖人。”

En: Cool.
I'M FROM COURON... He changes tactics: "AND NO, IT IS NOT *JUST* IN REVACHOL. THIS CITY IS CENTRAL TO THE SEMENESE STRATEGY. SPREADING THROUGH ITS TRADE NETWORKS OUR CULTURE WILL DOMINATE THE WORLD."
Zh: “我是在科戎出生的……”他换了个思路：“但我并不*只是*来自于瑞瓦肖。这座城市是塞美尼人战略的中心。我们的文化正通过瑞瓦肖的贸易网络向外传播，并终将主宰全世界。”

En: YES.
Zh: “是的。”

En: He would be appreciative if you did not further chase this line of inquire in front of the women.
Zh: 如果你不当着女人的面继续追问下去的话，他会很感激的。

En: This could have made him more open to discussing the *Race Enigma" with you...
Zh: 这可能会使得他愿意跟你更加开诚布公地探讨*种族之谜*……

En: YOU HAVE HEARD ENOUGH ABOUT OUR PHYLOGENETIC SECRETS FOR TODAY. YOU HAVE EXTINCTION TO COME TO TERMS WITH -- AND *NEVER* GETTING THAT DEAD BODY DOWN FROM THE TREE.
Zh: “今天告诉你的我们种族演化的秘密已经够多了。接下来你得去跟你们种族的灭绝和解——以及跟自己*永远都无法*把尸体从树上取下来这一现实和解。。”

En: YOU HAVE HEARD ENOUGH ABOUT OUR PHYLOGENETIC SECRETS FOR TODAY. YOU HAVE EXTINCTION TO COME TO TERMS WITH -- AND *NEVER* GETTING INTO THE HARBOUR.
Zh: “今天告诉你的我们种族演化的秘密已经够多了。接下来你得去跟你们种族的灭绝和解——以及跟*永远都无法*进入港口这一事实和解。”

En: YOU HAVE HEARD ENOUGH ABOUT OUR PHYLOGENETIC SECRETS FOR TODAY. YOU HAVE EXTINCTION TO COME TO TERMS WITH. THINK UPON IT.
Zh: “今天告诉你的我们种族演化的秘密已经够多了。接下来你得去跟你们种族的灭绝和解。回去好好想想吧。”

En: Kim, what do you think about this?
Zh: “金，你怎么看？”

En: I think this racist is better than the last -- but the next racist will be the really good one.
Zh: “我觉得现在的这个种族主义者比之前那个要好——不过下次再遇上一个的话肯定会更好。”

En: I don't think anything about this. We're wasting our time having this conversation.
Zh: “我没什么看法。这次谈话纯属浪费时间。”

En: That will be the...
Zh: 那就是……

En: That will be our lucky racist!
Zh: “那这个人将成为我们今天的幸运种族主义者！”

En: How do you know there will be a next racist?
Zh: “你怎么知道接下来我们还会遇上种族主义者？”

En: I liked the previous racist better, actually.
Zh: “我其实还是更喜欢之前的那个种族主义者。”

En: He will grant us three wishes.
Zh: “他会满足我们三个愿望。”

En: YOUR PAEDOMORPHIC FRIEND HAS QUICK WITS. He leans in to inspect: "A PROTRUDING OCCIPUT AND AN INDENTED ZYGOMATIC BONE..."
Zh: “你那位低幼态的朋友脑子转得挺快。”他靠近查看着：“凸出的枕骨，还有凹陷的颧骨……”

En: The lieutenant does not flinch.
Zh: 警督没有退缩。

En: YOU SHOULD KEEP HIM CLOSE. THE CONGENITAL DEFECT OF FARSIGHTEDNESS DOES NOT RENDER HIM A COMPLETE INVALID. HE STILL HAS THE USE OF HIS MIND.
Zh: “你应该跟紧他。远视的先天缺陷并没有让他完全残废，他还有点脑子。”

En: There always is.
Zh: “总是有的。”

En: RACE IS REALITY. He nods approvingly.
Zh: “种族就是现实。”他点头表示赞同。

En: Hmh. He seems surprised at your choice of racist, but then slowly nods.
Zh: “嗯。”他似乎对你选择了种族主义而感到很惊讶，但是之后又缓缓点了点头。

En: THAT IS UNDERSTANDABLE. THE PREVIOUS RACIST DID NOT POSE AN IMMOVABLE OBSTACLE IN ENTERING THE HARBOUR.
Zh: “很好理解，之前的种族主义者并不能真的阻碍你们进港口。”

En: THAT IS UNDERSTANDABLE. THE PREVIOUS RACIST WAS PROBABLY AN OCCIDENTAL, AND DID NOT PROVE A REAL ADVERSARY.
Zh: “很好理解。你们之前碰见的种族主义者大概是个奥西登人，并不能真的成为一个合格的对手。”

En: These cops are just jealous, Jean-Luc.
Zh: “这些警察只是妒忌你罢了，让·卢克。”

En: YOUR PAEDOMORPHIC FRIEND IS RIGHT. YOU SHOULD LEAVE HERE, WITH YOUR TAIL BETWEEN YOUR LEGS, CONTEMPLATING RACE EXTINCTION. I AM AN IMMOVABLE OBSTACLE.
Zh: “你这位低幼态的朋友说得对。你应该夹着尾巴离开这里，好好思考一下种族灭绝的问题。我会一直站在这里，不动如山。”

En: Why are you with Measurehead?
Zh: “你为什么要和测颅先生在一起？”

En: Look at him -- he's craniometric perfection. Are you cops or what?
Zh: “看看他——在颅骨测量学标准上来说他是完美的。你是警察吗，还是别的什么？”

En: Your ear lobes are too big.
Zh: “你的耳垂太大了。”

En: You *sure* I'm not craniometrically superior to you?
Zh: “你*确定*我在颅骨测量学上没有更胜你一筹？”

En: You're right. That's craniometric perfection. My race does not stand a chance.
Zh: “你是对的，你在颅骨测量学标准上确实是完美的，我所在的种族完全没有胜出的可能。”

En: Say nothing.
Zh: 一言不发。

En: YOUR SILENCE BETRAYS YOUR INFERIORITY. YOU DO NOT HAVE A REPLY. YOU SHOULD ENTER A DEEP RACE SLUMBER. PERHAPS IN FOUR THOUSAND YEARS THERE IS NEED FOR A SERVILE HOMONCULUS.
Zh: “你的沉默暴露了你的低劣，你已无话可说。你们全种族都应该去休眠，也许四千年后的世界会需要一个奴颜婢膝的侏儒。”

En: Are you sure? I mean... that jaw is clearly an atavistic stigmata.
Zh: “你确定吗？我是说……你的下巴显然具备返祖的特点。”

En: That atavistic stigmata makes pussy say *yes, plenty*.
Zh: “那个所谓的返祖特点让人家愿意说*哇，好大”

En: BABE, THANKS. The tattoos on his stone face briefly form a smile. "BUT I GOT THIS."
Zh: “宝贝，谢谢你。”他石头一般脸上的纹身短暂地微笑了一下。“不过交给我就好。”

En: THE SIZE OF THE EAR LOBES IS NOT A REAL CRANIOMETRIC CRITERIA. EVERYONE KNOWS THIS.
Zh: “耳垂的大小不是真正的颅骨测量学依据，这是常识。”

En: Your ear lobes are flawless, Jean-Luc.
Zh: “你的耳垂无可挑剔，让·卢克。”

En: YES... The man falls silent, his face motionless.
Zh: “是的……”男人陷入沉默，面无表情。

En: You have him off guard now... he's preoccupied with this situation with his woman.
Zh: 你让他完全放松了警惕……他和他的女人现在都在全身心地思考这件事。

En: YOU EXHIBIT FORWARD PROJECTION OF THE JAW -- INDICATIVE OF SCHIZOPHRENIA AND SEXUAL INACCOUNTABILITY. FROM A PURELY AESTHETIC STANDPOINT, THE DIMPLE IN YOUR JAW MAKES YOU LOOK LIKE A BABY. THIS IS NOT CRANIOMETRY, JUST AN OBSERVATION.
Zh: “你下颌前突——这是精神分裂症以及性无能的症状。纯以美学标准衡量，你下颌上的凹槽让你看上去就像一个婴孩。这还不是颅骨测量法得出的结论，我只是随便看了一下而已。”

En: IT IS IMPOSSIBLE TO SEE ANY MORE OF YOUR BONE STRUCTURE -- IT IS COVERED IN THE RAVAGES OF AL GUL. FROM WHAT REMAIN OF YOUR FEATURES, I CAN SEE *FLESHY LIPS*, *BALDNESS OF THE HEAD*, AND LONG ARMS RELATIVE TO LOWER LIMBS.
Zh: “你其他的骨骼结构都已经无法辨认了——它已经被己戊留下的废墟所包裹。至于你残存的外观，我只能分辨出*厚唇*，*秃顶*，还有相对于下肢来说过长的手臂。”

En: THIS LEADS ME TO CONCLUDE: YOU ARE NOT A POLICE OFFICER. YOU ARE A COMMON CRIMINAL, AN OFFSPRING OF MURDERERS AND SAILORS FROM SUR-LA-CLEF AND VESPER; AND POSSIBLY EVEN THE DEGENERATE SHEEP HERDERS OF *UBI*.
Zh: “综上所述：你不是警察。你是个随处可见的罪犯，你的血统来源于苏拉菲和威斯珀的杀人犯及水手，甚至还有可能是*乌比*劣等的牧羊人。”

En: What else?
Zh: “还有呢？”

En: That's enough.
Zh: “够了。”

En: YOU DO NOT WISH TO BE JUDGED, BECAUSE YOU ARE A GENETIC BLOB OF POLYCULTURAL DEFORMITIES. THIS IS UNDERSTANDABLE.
Zh: “你不想被人评判，因为你是个诞生自病态的多文化性的遗传体。这一点可以理解。”

En: CORRECT.
Zh: “没错。”

En: Interesting -- so one of my ancestors was Sur-La-Clef and the other Vesper?
Zh: “有意思——所以说我先祖中有一个苏拉菲人，还有一个威斯珀人？”

En: YOUR RACIAL HERITAGE IS UNINTERESTING. IT IS THE SAME AS ALL REVACHOLIANS. YOUR PARENTS AND THEIR PARENTS MADE THE DECISION TO REPRODUCE, WHILE UNDER THE INFLUENCE OF AL GUL. THAT IS THE ONLY REASON YOU ARE HERE.
Zh: “你的种族谱系毫无意义，其他所有瑞瓦肖人也一样。你的父母也好，他们的父母也罢，全都是在己戊的影响下才决定进行生殖行为的，这也是你目前苟活于世的唯一的理由。”

En: No, I'll better not say anything on this topic.
Zh: 不，对于这个话题我最好还是什么也别说。

En: I want to learn this advanced race theory -- to replace my previous race theory. It is *basic*, I'm afraid.
Zh: “我想学习这一先进的种族理论——来替代我之前的种族理论。我担心现有的这个理论太*基础*了。”

En: I want to learn this race theory of yours. So that we could become... friends? (Try to smile pathetically.)
Zh: “我想学习你的种族理论。所以我们能不能……交个朋友呢？”（试着露出惹人同情的微笑。）

En: DO NOT BE NAIVE. I KNOW THE ANSWER TO THE GREAT RACE ENIGMA. WHY WOULD I SHARE IT WITH A DEFORMED INFANT? YOU DO NOT HAVE THE DEVOTION FOR SERVITUDE.
Zh: “别做梦了，我知晓伟大种族之谜的答案，但我凭什么要把这个答案拿出来跟一个怪胎分享？你并没有做好当奴才的觉悟。”

En: YOU WILL MAKE DUE WITH YOUR PRIMITIVE THEORY. I KNOW THE ANSWER TO THE GREAT RACE ENIGMA. WHY WOULD I SHARE IT WITH A DEFORMED INFANT? YOU DO NOT HAVE THE DEVOTION FOR SERVITUDE.
Zh: “你自己原始的理论还是留给你自己处理吧。我知晓伟大种族之谜的答案，但我凭什么要把这个答案拿出来跟一个怪胎分享？你并没有做好当奴才的觉悟。”

En: That's understandable. Jean-Luc Measurehead is a sage and an intellectual giant of race theory. Who are you? Handmaiden of Al Gul.
Zh: 这个可以理解。测颅先生让·卢克是一个圣人，是种族理论思想上的巨人。你又是谁？己戊的奴仆。

En: Measurehead, I am new to this world. Help me understand its races. I need to know what kind of different races are there?
Zh: “测颅先生，我对这个世界还很陌生，请帮我梳理一下这个世界的种族。我想了解一下这个世界上有哪些不同的种族？”

En: I don't want to do that. (Opt out.)
Zh: 我不想这么做。（决定退出。）

En: THERE ARE THREE CATEGORIES OF RACE: TYPE A -- THE HEROIC RACES -- TYPE B -- THE SERVILE RACES -- AND THE VILE C-F RACE CAULDRON OF PEDERASTY. WHICH ONE DO YOU NEED EDUCATION ON?
Zh: “种族一共有三类：A类——英雄种族，B类——奴隶种族，以及肮脏的C-F类——鸡奸者的大染缸。你想了解哪一类？”

En: Why are you not with the Hardie boys?
Zh: “你为什么没加入哈迪兄弟？”

En: I AM NOT THE FIRST LINE OF DEFENCE -- I AM THE LAST. He looks toward the coast, defiantly. "IN ADDITION, THESE SO-CALLED *HARDIE BOYS* ARE AN EFFEMINATE CLIQUE OF BODYBUILDERS. THEIR COMPANY IS SPIRITUALLY DEGRADING."
Zh: “我并非第一道防线——我是最后的防线。”他轻蔑地望向海岸的方向。“另外，那些所谓的*哈迪兄弟*只是一群娘炮健美运动员。他们这伙人在精神上已经退化了。”

En: But you're all part of the Union?
Zh: “但你们都是工会的成员啊？”

En: There's more to it. What have you got against them?
Zh: “不止这些吧。你对他们有什么不满？”

En: THE HARDIE MANLETS ARE ON THE PAY OF THE COMPANY. I ANSWER TO THE UNION ALONE -- AND I DO THIS OUT OF *RACE HEROISM*. FINANCE IS AN ALIEN CONCEPT TO THE SEMENESE.
Zh: “小矮子哈迪同时还在拿公司的工资，而我只对工会负责——而且纯粹出于*种族英雄主义*。对于我们塞美尼人来说，金钱是个外来的概念。”

En: NOW LEAVE ME BE. I MUST LUXURIATE IN THE COMPANY OF MY WOMAN.
Zh: “现在让我安静一会儿。我要尽情享受自己女人的陪伴。”

En: You pick up on something artificial in his tone, like he's putting on an *act*. This is unlike him. He is usually more himself.
Zh: 你在他的语气中觉察到了一丝刻意，有点像是在*演戏*。这不像他的风格，他一般都要更自我一些。

En: FINE. THEY HAVE RECENTLY FALLEN UNDER THE INFLUENCE OF A POSSIBLY SEXUALLY PERVERTED FEMALE VAGRANT AND A NARCOTICS PEDDLER. IT'S SHAMEFUL.
Zh: “好吧。他们最近可能受了一个来路不明的女变态和一个毒贩的影响。真是太丢脸了。”

En: Who do you mean?
Zh: “你在说什么？”

En: FIND OUT FOR YOURSELF, ENDOMORPHIC BLOB.
Zh: “自己查去吧，你个内胚胎畸形儿。”

En: Interesting. The lieutenant takes a quick note.
Zh: “有意思。”警督快速记了几笔。

En: Let it be.
Zh: 随它去吧。

En: Yes, it was probably nothing.
Zh: 是的，可能也没什么。

En: Yes. Better not to expand your mind in this direction. You may find out too much about the *mystery*, fly too close to the race sun.
Zh: 是的。最好不要朝这个方向发散思维了，你可能会获知太多的*秘密*，太过接近种族的太阳。

En: I think I know what the Race Enigma is.
Zh: “我想我知道种族之谜是什么了。”

En: Do you? The lieutenant looks at you.
Zh: “你认真的吗？”警督看着你。

En: I do.
Zh: “是的。”

En: (Whisper.) "This is for the... thing."
Zh: （低语。）“这是都是为了……那个。”

En: On second thought, I don't. (Relinquish the opportunity to learn advanced race theory.)
Zh: “转念一想，我又没兴趣了。”（放弃学习先进种族理论的机会。）

En: What thing? We already got *in* the harbour. You just want to hear about races, don't you?
Zh: “什么‘那个’？我们都已经*进去过*港口了。你就是自己想听种族的事，对吗？”

En: There must be another way to accomplish police work -- without *racecraft*.
Zh: “肯定还有其他方法完成刑侦工作——在不涉及*种族学*的情况下。”

En: THERE IS NO OTHER WAY TO ACCOMPLISH ANYTHING. RACECRAFT IS THE ONLY WAY.
Zh: “想要完成任何一件事情都不存任何其他方法。种族学才是唯一的方法。”

En: The lieutenant looks toward the harbour's electronic door and then to you. He lets out an audible sigh.
Zh: 警督看了看港口的大门，然后看向你。他发出一声清晰可闻的叹息。

En: YOU ARE OBVIOUSLY A LIBERAL, SEOLITE, the man tells him. "A POLYCULTURALIST. I CAN SEE IT FROM YOUR LOVE OF MICROTECHNOLOGY AND YOUR SARTORIAL CHOICES. DO NOT DENY YOUR FRIEND THE TRUTH YOU HAVE DENIED YOURSELF."
Zh: “你显然是个自由主义者，西奥人，”男人对他说，“以及一个文化多元主义者，我可以从你对微电子技术的喜爱还有着装的选择上看出来。不要像你自我蒙蔽一样试图阻挠你的朋友了解现实真相。”

En: Type A.
Zh: “A类。”

En: Type B.
Zh: “B类。”

En: The vile C-F race cauldron of pederasty, please.
Zh: “C-F类，鸡奸者的大染缸，多谢。”

En: Now that we've been through all the types -- do I understand Advanced Race Theory?
Zh: “现在我们已经了解过了全部的类型——我算是掌握先进种族理论了吗？”

En: A RECEDING GENETIC POOL HAS LED THE MAUN ON REPREHENSIBLE STREET PARADES, IN MAUN CITIES LIKE STAADSKANAAL AND VREDEFORT, WEARING WOODEN CLOGS ON THEIR FEET, AND LITTLE GREEN TASSELS ON THEIR HATS.
Zh: “在退化的基因池的作用下，马翁人纷纷穿上木屐，并在帽子上插上绿色的小流苏，在他们的城市比如斯塔德卡纳尔和弗里德堡的街头开始了他们可憎的游行。”

En: I KNEW YOU WOULD GO STRAIGHT FOR THE VILE CAULDRON -- EVERYONE DOES. He does not look surprised. "YOU NEED TO FIRST LEARN ABOUT TYPE A AND B TO APPRECIATE THE DEPRAVITY OF THE CHIMERIC RACES."
Zh: “我就知道你一上来就会问大染缸——其他人也这样。”他看起来并不意外。“你先要了解了A类和B类之后才能进一步理解杂交种族的堕落。”

En: Yeah, I mean otherwise... the woman twirls her hair, "it just won't make any sense."
Zh: “是啊，不然……”女人捻弄着自己的头发，“就太没道理了。”

En: Yes. It would seem *nonsensical*.
Zh: “是的，好像的确*没什么道理*。”

En: THE MAUN ARE PROOF THAT YOU CAN HAVE TOO MUCH OCCIDENTAL RACIAL PURITY -- AND TASSEL-CENTRIC CULTURE. INBREEDING HAS LED TO A LACTOSE INTOLERANT SUB-RACE WHOM NO ONE CAN TAKE SERIOUSLY.
Zh: “马翁族证明了当奥西登种族纯粹性过高时反倒会过犹不及——以及流苏中心主义的文化有多无谓。近亲繁殖导致了一个乳糖不耐的亚种族的诞生，这样的种族没人会看得起。”

En: THOSE ARE THE SEMENESE, THE AREOPAGITE, AND THE OCCIDENTALS -- EXCLUDING THE *MAUN* OF COURSE. THE MAUN ARE RIDDLED WITH ECZEMA TO THE POINT WHERE THEY FIND IT IMPOSSIBLE TO SMILE. THEY ARE ALL LACTOSE INTOLERANT -- A COMMON RESULT OF INBREEDING...
Zh: “A类包括塞美尼人，艾瑞奥帕吉特人，还有奥西登人——当然了，*马翁人*得排除掉，他们身上的湿疹已经严重到了笑不出来的程度。他们全都乳糖不耐——近亲繁殖的普遍结果……”

En: Wait -- who exactly are the Maun?
Zh: “等等——到底哪些国家是马翁族？”

En: Okay, got it. Who *are* type A then, in your view?
Zh: “好吧，明白了。那在你看来，*真正的*A类都有哪些？”

En: YOU KNOW THEM BY THE NAMES OF THEIR NATION STATES: *THE ORANJESE*, *THE GOTTWALDIANS* AND *THE KÖNIGSTEINERS*. MY PEOPLE SIMPLY CALL THEM *MAUN*.
Zh: “从那些国家的国名就能看出来：*奥兰治*，*戈特伍德*还有*柯尼希斯*。我们简单地把他们归为*马翁族*。”

En: *Maun* is a derogative term for first-world people of Gottwaldian descent. They do not *all* have eczema. Also, people of Katla, like the Suru and the Uuhu, are much more lactose intolerant.
Zh: *马翁*是对拥有戈特伍德血统的一系列第一世界民族的蔑称，他们并不*全都*有湿疹。此外，像苏鲁族和乌胡族这样卡特拉人的乳糖不耐其实要更严重一些。

En: The wooden clogs, though?
Zh: 木屐？

En: Got it.
Zh: 懂了。

En: In some municipalities of Oranje, people do wear shoes made of wood to street parades. Green, orange, and even yellow tassels have also been seen on hats.
Zh: 在奥兰治的一些自治市，人们会穿着木头制成的鞋子，去参加街头游行，帽子上还会装饰着绿色、橙色甚至是黄色的流苏。

En: You're welcome.
Zh: 不客气。

En: THE VESPERTINES AND MESSINIANS OF VESPER AND MESSINA; THE ANCIENT METEORANS OF METEO BY THE GOLDEN PISANTIC SEA, THE SURESNE OF SUR-LA-CLEF AND EVEN THE NORTH-KÖNIGSTEINERS -- ALL HAVE TYPE A RACE PROPENSITIES.
Zh: “维斯珀及梅西纳联邦的维斯珀人和梅西纳人；居住在金色皮桑缇克海边上的古弥忒欧人，苏拉菲的苏人，甚至还包括北柯尼希斯人——全都具备A类种族的特点。”

En: THE OTHER LARGE MONDIAL CIVILIZATION -- THE MESQUE -- ARE TOO YELLOW AND OLEAGINOUS TO COUNT AS A HEROIC RACE; TRUE, THEY ARE VIOLENT AND EXPANSIONIST, BUT THEY HAVE A *GLANDULAR PROBLEM*... He draws his finger across his face...
Zh: “另一个世界性的大型文明——梅斯克——他们的肤色太黄太油腻，不能看作是英雄种族。虽说他们确实尚武而且热衷于开疆拓土，但他们的腺体有一点*毛病*……”他用手指划过面颊……

En: OVERPRODUCTION OF *SEBUM*. SEBUM IS LEAKING INTO THEIR BRAINS, MAKING THEM LISTEN TO *EL MARIACHI* MUSIC AND EAT TOXIC MINCED MEAT BASED FOOD. WHICH IN TURN ONLY PRODUCES MORE SEBUM.
Zh: “他们的*皮脂*分泌过量。皮脂侵入了他们的大脑，所以他们会听*流浪乐队*的音乐，吃恶心的肉糜为底料的食物，这些习俗反过来继续让他们生成更多的皮脂。”

En: And who are the Semenese and Areopagites in this?
Zh: “那塞美尼人和艾瑞奥帕吉特人呢？”

En: AS PROVEN BY THE MAUN AND THE MESQUE, OCCIDENTAL TYPE A IS IN RETROGRADE; THE SEMENESE AND THE AREOPAGITE ARE ON THE ASCENT.
Zh: “之前马翁族和梅斯克族的例子足以证明奥西登的A类正在倒退，而塞美尼和艾瑞奥帕吉特则正在上升。”

En: THE INDIGENOUS PEOPLE OF THIS, THE INSULINDIAN ARCHIPELAGO. THE SEMENESE INHABIT THE SOUTHERN ISLANDS... He gestures toward the South, across the ocean. "*I* AM SEMENESE -- FROM THE STOCK OF ULUNBUIR ON ILE DU FANTÔME."
Zh: “伊苏林迪群岛的本土居民。塞美尼人居住在南部诸岛……..”他指了指南方，海的另一头。“*我*就是塞美尼人——幽灵岛乌伦布尔部的血脉。”

En: And the Semenese are...
Zh: “那塞美尼人是……”

En: And the Areopagites...
Zh: “那艾瑞奥帕吉特人是……”

En: What's the difference between the Semenese and the Areopagites? (Continue receiving wisdom.)
Zh: “塞美尼人和艾瑞奥帕吉特人之间有什么区别？”（继续聆听教诲。）

En: THE AREOPAGITES ARE THE MASTER RACE OF THE IILMARAAN DESERTS. THE SEMENESE ARE DESCENDANTS OF THE AREOPAGITES. WE CAME HERE DURING A *HEROIC MIGRATION* FROM IILMARAA TO INSULINDE. THOUSANDS OF YEARS BEFORE THE LACTOSE INTOLERANT, MAUN-RIDDEN OCCIDENTALS DISCOVERED THIS PLACE.
Zh: “艾瑞奥帕吉特人是伊尔玛沙漠的主民族，塞美尼人则是艾瑞奥帕吉特人的后裔。我们在一次*英雄远征*中从伊尔玛来到了伊苏林迪，比乳糖不耐的马翁族奥西登人发现这个地方还早了上千年。”

En: Jean, baby, you're on fire... The young woman looks adoringly.
Zh: “让，宝贝，你真是太惹火了……”年轻女人的眼里满是崇拜。

En: I KNOW, BABE.
Zh: “我知道的，宝贝。”

En: Wait, didn't *Iilmaraan desert pygmees* invent alcohol and get pillaged just a short while ago?
Zh: 等等，刚才不是还说是*伊尔玛沙漠侏儒*发明了酒精，然后又被掠夺一空了吗？

En: Weren't the Iilmaraans pillaged by *my people* and then Al Gul happened and all that?
Zh: “己戊不是*我的民族*劫掠了伊尔玛人以后出现的吗？”

En: NO, THOSE WERE SCIMITAR WIELDING RACE LOSERS OF SAHRAVA, YEESUT AND BASHIR, WITH THEIR HIMI SERVANTS. *BIG DIFFERENCE*. THE AREOPAGITES WERE FASTING AND CONQUERING WHILE THIS HAPPENED -- YOU NEVER PENETRATED THE WESTERN DUNES.
Zh: “不，那些是耍着弯刀的来自萨哈瓦、伊苏特和贝希尔失败种族以及他们的希米恩仆从，二者*大有不同*。这一切发生的时候，艾瑞奥帕吉特人正在斋戒并四处征战——你永远无法穿越西部沙丘。”

En: THE AREOPAGITES ARE SLEEK, LONG-HEADED. THE SEMENESE ARE POWERFUL, MESOMORPHIC. THE FORMER IS AN IMMUTABLE PROGENITOR, UNCHANGED SINCE THE SUPER-ISOLA OF PERIKARNASSIS. ANCIENT BRAINS REST IN THEIR SLENDER SKULLS... He falls silent, contemplating the beauty and the mystery.
Zh: “艾瑞奥帕吉特人身材纤巧，头颅颀长。塞美尼人力大无穷，体格健壮。前者是我们永不变化的先祖，自他们还在佩里卡纳西斯大洲的时代起就未曾发生过任何演化，上古的大脑栖息在他们细瘦的颅骨中……”他陷入沉默，开始想象着那份美丽和神秘。

En: Then he continues: "THE LATTER IS PERFECTED AND ADAPTING. TOGETHER THEY FORM THE SEMENO-AREOPAGITE OR *SEMEOPAGITE* SUPERRACE -- THAT IS ALL. THERE ARE NO MORE TYPE A RACES IN THE WORLD."
Zh: 然后他继续说道：“后者要更完善，适应力更强。两者共同组成了塞美尼-艾瑞奥帕吉特人，或者是*塞美奥帕吉特*超种族。这就是世界上全部的A类的种族了。”

En: Nature was not capable of more.
Zh: 这已经是大自然的极限了。

En: PINKNESS IS A RACIAL QUALITY THAT HAS TO BE EARNED THROUGH CENTURIES OF ADVANCED BALLISTIC WARFARE AND CULTURAL DOMINATION THAT THE GRAAD PEOPLE HAVE UNDERGONE FOR DRINKING AL GUL AND SMOKING THE DEGENERATE *TABAC* HERB... AND FOR EATING *POTATO*.
Zh: “作为一种种族特征，粉色的肤色只有通过数个世纪之久的先进热兵器战争以及文化霸权方可取得，而格拉德人发动战争、文化称霸的目的其实只是为了有己戊喝、有*烟草*抽……以及有*土豆*吃。”

En: THEY ARE MICROSCOPIC. THE SEMENO-AREOPAGITE SUPERSTATE WILL COVER THE *ENTIRE* REMAINING PLANETARY CRUST, UNINTERRUPTED FROM HOLY SEMENINE TO THE BOREAL PLATEAU OF KATLA.
Zh: “他们统统微不足道，塞美尼-艾瑞奥帕吉特人组成的超国家将会遍布*全部*地壳，从圣洁的塞美尼到卡特拉的北部高原，绵延不绝。

En: TYPE B ARE THE *UNHEROIC RACES*. AMORPHOUS NON-COMPETITORS OF THE GREAT RACE. THE KOJKOS AND THE VACHOLIERS, THEY ARE MUD COLOURED PEOPLE.
Zh: “B类是*懦夫种族*。在伟大的种族面前，他们毫无组织，也无力竞争。B类包括克吉克人和瓦科莱人，他们属于泥色人种。”

En: ITS LEADERS WILL BE THE GENETIC EPITOME OF THE SEMENESE AND AREOPAGITE STOCK, ELECTED BY NATURE; NOT THE BASE, INERT SPOILAGE CALLED *DEMOS*.
Zh: “大自然遴选出了他们中的领袖，就像是塞美尼和艾瑞奥帕吉特血统的缩影；叫作“民众”的底层则不同，不过是一群死气沉沉的渣滓。”

En: You said *Kojkos*. I've been trained to identify them as *white* in official  descriptions.
Zh: “你用了*克吉克*这个词。我培训的时候对他们官方的归类是*白人*。”

En: THE KOJKO -- THE COUNTLESS MICRONATIONALITIES OF GRAAD -- ARE ALL INEXPLICABLY OBSESSED WITH *POTAAT*. THE ONLY THING THEY LIKE MORE IS DIVIDING INTO MICROSCOPIC ETHNOSTATES. LIKE POLITICAL AMOEBA.
Zh: “克吉克人——即格拉德境内无数小民族的通称——都莫名地痴迷于*土豆*。唯一能胜过他们对土豆的喜爱的，就是他们对于分裂成袖珍的单民族国家的热衷，就像政治版图上的阿米巴原虫一样。”

En: THEN THERE IS...  He pauses dramatically. "THE SEMENO-KOJKIC CHIMERA. ARE YOU SURE YOU WISH TO KNOW OF THE SEMENO-KOJKIC CHIMERA? IT IS NOT AN AESTHETIC SIGHT."
Zh: “然后就是……”他戏剧性地停顿了一下。“塞美尼-克吉克族的混合族群。你确定还想听下去吗？那可算不上是什么让人舒服的话题。”

En:
THIS WILL NEVER HAPPEN. THE SEMENESE AND THE KOJKO *MAY* HAVE SIMILAR INTERBREEDING PROBLEMS AS THE MESQUITO -- WE WILL NEVER KNOW PRECISELY. NO SEMENESE MAN COULD MAINTAIN AN ERECTION IN THE SUFFOCATING POTATO STENCH OF A KOJKO WOMAN, OR *KOJKA*.	“这是不可能的。塞美尼人和克吉克人的组合*也许*像梅斯克蚊人一样存在杂交的问题——这点应该是永远都无法证实了，因为根本没有哪个塞美尼男人能在一个散发着土豆的恶臭的克吉克——或*克吉卡*——女人面前一直保持勃起。

YOU TRIED YOUR DEGENERATE LITTLE REVOLUTION, WHICH WAS THE SINGLE GREATEST FAILURE COMMITTED BY HUMANS IN OUR 82,000 YEAR HISTORY ON THIS PLANET."
Zh: “就是瑞瓦肖人——介于A类和种族大染缸之间。瑞瓦肖人血统的混杂太过严重，已经无法分辨基因的优劣了。你们还尝试发动可悲又低劣的革命，却铸成了人类诞生82,000年以来犯下最严重的错误。”

En: THE REVOLUTION CAME TO REVACHOL FROM GRAAD, IN TZARAATH-RIDDEN POTATO CARTS -- IT IS LITERALLY AN ILLNESS. A PRION DISEASE THAT LEAVES THE PARIETAL AND FRONTAL LOBE RIDDEN WITH HOLES. A SOFT, SPONGELIKE MASS OF DEMENTIA, HALLUCINATIONS, AND PARANOIA...
Zh: “大革命跟着满载发霉土豆的推车里从格拉德一路到了瑞瓦肖——毫不夸张地说它与疫病无异，就是那种能让人的顶骨和大脑额叶落个千疮百孔的朊病毒。大革命不过是一团柔软的海绵状的痴呆、幻觉还有偏执病症罢了……

En: THE REVOLUTION IS *FATAL FAMILIAL INSOMNIA*. A HEREDITARY PRION CONDITION PASSED FROM THE KOJKO TO THE OCCIDENTALS... He pauses in theoretic self-reflection. "BUT NOT SEXUALLY, PROBABLY THROUGH TRADE ROUTES AND POTATE-ACID, THE PRIME COMPONENT OF THE POTATO PLANT..."
Zh: “大革命就是*致命性家族性失眠症*，那是一种代际遗传的朊病毒病，克吉克人直接把这种病传给奥西登人……”他中断了理论推演。“但是这种病毒的传播媒介却并不是性，而可能是贸易以及土豆酸——也就是马铃薯植株的主要成分……”

En: The Kojkos of Graad (Yugo, Zsiemsk, Shest et al) are what you would call, white, officer -- in a suspect description.
Zh: 格拉德境内的克吉克人（尤古人，西姆斯科人，西斯特人等等）就是你在犯罪嫌疑人记录里所说的白人，警官。

En: Mud-coloured?
Zh: “泥色？”

En: PINKNESS IS A RACIAL QUALITY THAT HAS TO BE EARNED THROUGH CENTURIES OF ADVANCED BALLISTIC WARFARE AND CULTURAL DOMINATION THAT THE GRAAD PEOPLE HAVE UNDERGONE FOR DRINKING AL GUL AND SMOKING THE DEGENERATE *TABAC* HERB... AND FOR EATING *POTATO*...
Zh: “作为一种种族特征，粉色的肤色只有通过数个世纪之久的先进热兵器战争以及文化霸权方可取得，而格拉德人发动战争、文化称霸的目的其实只是为了有己戊喝、有*烟草*抽……以及有*土豆*吃。”

En: Another traitor. I thought you of all people would support the ethnostate.
Zh: “又是个叛徒。我还以为你跟其他人不一样，会支持单种族国家呢。”

En: You don't like ethnostates?
Zh: “你不喜欢单民族国家？”

En: And the *Vacholiers* you mentioned?
Zh: “那你提到的*瓦科莱人*呢？”

En: DEMOCRATIC ETHNOSTATES ARE MICROSCOPIC. THEY BREED GENETIC MEDIOCRITY. THE SEMENO-AREOPAGITE SUPERSTATE WILL COVER THE *ENTIRE* REMAINING PLANETARY CRUST, UNINTERRUPTED FROM HOLY SEMENINE TO THE BOREAL PLATEAU OF KATLA.
Zh: “民主制的单民族国家小若蝼蚁，这种国家只能培育出平庸的基因。而塞美尼-艾瑞奥帕吉特人的超国家将会遍布*全部*地壳，从神圣的塞美尼到卡特拉的北部高原，绵延不绝。”

En: Is it 82,000 years that we've been recording history? You have very little idea of what is happening, but that seems a little off.
Zh: 人类已知的历史居然有82000年之久？你对现在的局势不甚了解，不过这句话听起来好像还是哪里有点不太对劲。

En: THE MYSTERIES OF THE PEOPLE OF THIS PLANET ARE A TRAGEDY THAT HAS PLAYED OUT COUNTLESS TIMES OVER, LIKE A FEVER DREAM OF SKIN, HAIR, AND BONE. WAKE UP -- NAIVE CHESS PIECE.
Zh: “这颗行星上的人类历史就是一出早已上演无数次的悲剧，就像是一场充斥着皮肤、头发和骨头的热夜之梦。快醒醒吧，天真的棋子。”

En: I'm pretty sure History hasn't lasted that long.
Zh: “我很肯定人类的历史没那么长。”

En: (Go away stupid political thoughts.) "What was this Revolution?"
Zh: （滚开愚蠢的政治思想。）“大革命是什么？”

En: I've heard about this Revolution. Mistakes were made, but it was the right stuff. You're wrong about it.
Zh: “我听说过这场大革命，虽然也在过程中也铸成过错误，但它本身还是正确的。你说得不对。”

En: That Revolution sounds like it was actually very good and necessary.
Zh: “其实听起来这场大革命还挺不赖的，而且很有必要。”

En: That Revolution was perpetrated by degenerate left wing marauders. Not all the people of Revachol.
Zh: “所谓的大革命听起来像是个别低劣的左翼分子的恶行，与瑞瓦肖的人民无关。”

En: That Revolution sounds like it was perpetrated by degenerate marauders. Not all the people of Revachol.
Zh: “所谓的大革命听起来像是个别低劣的暴徒的恶行，与瑞瓦肖的人民无关。”

En: ENOUGH OF TYPE B MEDIOCRITY, he nods, satisfied with the outcome.
Zh: “平庸的B类已经说的差不多了。”他点点头，对成果表示满意。

En: THE HEART THAT PUMPS THE HAEMOGLOBIN IS MYSTERIOUS, AND SO IS ITS DARK WILL, he answers enigmatically. "ENOUGH OF THESE PERSONAL MATTERS. HAVE YOU BEEN EDUCATED TO ALL THE RASSO-TYPES NOW?"
Zh: “输送血红蛋白的心脏是神秘的，它那黑暗的意志也同样神秘，”他玄虚地回答到。“个人的话题已经说的够多了。现在你已经掌握全部种族类型了吗？”

En: TYPES C-F ARE A MUSEUM OF FAILED *CHIMERIC EXPERIMENTS* AND TRAGIC MAL-ADAPTATIONS. THEY ARE TORTURED CREATURES WAITING TO BE PUT TO SLEEP. YOUR MORBID INTEREST IN THEM WORRIES ME.
Zh: “C-F类简直就是*奇美拉实验*悲剧失败品的博物馆，那是一群受尽折磨等待着被放倒的生物。你对他们展露出的病态的兴趣让我有些担心。”

En: Chimeric experiments?
Zh: “奇美拉实验？”

En: Yes, better not to go into it.
Zh: “是的，最好还是别太深入了。”

En: IT WOULD BE CRUEL. The man agrees. "TO ENTERTAIN OURSELVES WITH THEIR DEFORMITIES. WERE THERE ANY ABLE BODIED RACES YOU NEEDED EDUCATION ON?"
Zh: “将C-F类的畸形特征当作一个笑话来聊，”他表示赞同，“这确样实很残忍。你就不想了解一下其他健全的种族了吗？”

En: LESSER RACES LIKE THE *MESQUITO*, A GROTESQUE MIXTURE OF A MESQUE WOMAN AND A SEMENESE MAN, ONLY POSSIBLE IF THE MOTHER IS MESQUE AND THE FATHER SEMENESE. THE OTHER WAY AROUND THEY FAIL TO PRODUCE OFFSPRING.
Zh: “低等种族包括*梅斯克蚊人*就是梅斯克女人和塞美尼男人杂交后生出的诡异产物，只有母亲是梅斯克人、父亲是塞美尼人的情况下才能够诞生，梅斯克男人和塞美尼女人的组合则无法孕育后代。”

En: THE MESQUITO IS BORN STERILE. LIKE A DONKEY... He looks west, ruefully: "ALL THEY HAVE LEFT IS TO RIDE CUSTOMIZED MOTOR CARRIAGES WITH HYDRAULIC SUSPENSION, LISTENING TO AGGRESSIVE *EL MARIACHI* MUSIC TO VENT THEIR IMPOTENT DESPAIR."
Zh: “梅斯克蚊人生来就无法生育，就跟骡子一样……”他悲哀地向西眺望，“他们唯一能做到，就只有乘着液压悬挂的定制机车、听着激进的*流浪乐队*音乐来发泄无力的绝望。”

En: It seems unlikely that two human beings produce genetically sterile offspring.
Zh: 两个人类个体不大可能会产下没有生育力的后代。

En: Maybe I have misunderstood something, but aren't humans too similar to produce genetically sterile offspring.
Zh: “也许是我误解了，不过人类内部的差异性还不至于到会生产出无法生育的后代的程度吧？”

En: Any more?
Zh: “还有别的种族吗？”

En: YOU ARE RIGHT. YOU *HAVE* MISUNDERSTOOD. YOU LACK BASIC PHYLOGENETIC EDUCATION.
Zh: “你说得很对，你*确实*误解了。你对种系发生学缺乏基本的常识。”

En: The sage will not budge on this.
Zh: 圣人在这一点上是不会让步的。

En: TO AN UNTRAINED EYE THE KOJKO APPEAR WHITE AND PINKISH. LIKE A HAM SANDWICH. BUT LOOK INTO THEIR EYES AND YOU WILL SEE... He squints, full of sage wisdom: "THEY ARE OF AN INDISTINCT, MUDDY COLOUR. AND SO IS THEIR SKIN: UNHEALTHY, SWEATY AND ASHEN..."
Zh: “在没上过警校培训课的人看来，克吉克人是粉白色的，就像火腿三明治。但是只要看一下他们的眼睛，你就会发现……”他斜睨着你，眼里充满圣人的智慧，“他们的眼珠是一种混沌的烂泥色，而皮肤也差不多：病态、多汗、而且惨白……”

En: YES. TO AN UNTRAINED EYE THE KOJKO APPEAR WHITE AND PINKISH. LIKE A HAM SANDWICH. BUT LOOK INTO THEIR EYES AND YOU WILL SEE... He squints, full of sage wisdom: "THEY ARE OF AN INDISTINCT COLOUR. AND SO IS THEIR SKIN: UNHEALTHY, MUDDY AND ASHEN..."
Zh: “是的。在没上过警校培训课的人看来，克吉克人是粉白色的，就像火腿三明治。但是只要看一下他们的眼睛，你就会发现……”他斜睨着你，眼里充满圣人的智慧，“他们的眼珠是一种混沌的烂泥色，而皮肤也差不多：病态、多汗、而且惨白……”

En: Your eyes bounce to the young woman at his side, twirling her hair. It is light brownish and eyes are a random colour...
Zh: 你的目光跳跃到他身旁的年轻女子身上，她正在捻弄自己的头发。她的头发是浅褐色的，眼睛是杂色……

En: YOU NEED TO KNOW BOTH TYPES *A* AND *B* TO UNDERSTAND THE CONTEXT FOR THE RECKLESS GENETIC ABANDONMENT IN THE PHYLO-CAULDRON.
Zh: “在了解了*A*类和*B*类之后，你就会更理解大染缸到底意味着怎样程度的不计后果与放纵。”

En: Yeah.. The young woman puts a piece of chewing gum in her mouth. "You have to have context, you know."
Zh: “是啊……”年轻女子往嘴里丢了一块口香糖。“了解一下背景总是好的。”

En: Enough of C-F.
Zh: “C-F类说的差不多了。”

En: YES. IT IS CRUEL TO ENTERTAIN OURSELVES WITH THE DEFORMITIES OF C-F. WERE THERE ANY ABLE BODIED RACES YOU NEEDED EDUCATION ON?
Zh: “是的，将C-F类的畸形特征当作笑话实在太过残忍。你就不想了解一下其他健全的种族了吗？”

En: Yes.
Zh: “是的。”

En: Better not to. The Semeno-Kojkic chimera seems like more than I could handle right now.
Zh: “最好还是不要了吧。塞美尼-克吉卡混血的知识好像超出了现在我的承受范围。”

En: THE KOJKO, AS YOU KNOW, ARE VERY SERVILE. ESPECIALLY WHEN THEY MEET THE RICH-MAN. RACIAL SCIENTISTS HAVE TOYED WITH THE IDEA OF CROSSING THE SEMENESE WITH A KOJKO, TO PRODUCE A SUPER-WORKER OF SEMENESE STRENGTH AND GRAAD SERVILITY...
Zh: “如你所知，克吉克人非常具有奴性，特别是在他们遇到有钱人的时候。种族科学家设想过——要是让塞美尼人和克吉克人杂交的话，就会诞生出一个兼具塞美尼人力量和格拉德人奴性的超级劳工……”

En: There is a strange sadness in his tone. A less than heroic melancholy this time...
Zh: 他的口吻里有一种奇怪的悲伤。这一次，其中的忧郁不再如以往那样充满英雄气概……

En: THAT IS UNDERSTANDABLE. WERE THERE MORE FORTUNATE TYPES YOU NEEDED TO BE EDUCATED ABOUT?
Zh: “可以理解。你还有别的没那么可悲的种族想要了解吗？”

En: Wasn't she called *Katya*. A common name among the...
Zh: 她不是叫*卡佳*吗。这个常见的名字难道不是……

En: BUT ENOUGH. IT IS CRUEL TO ENTERTAIN OURSELVES WITH THE DEFORMITIES OF TYPE C-F. WERE THERE ANY ABLE BODIED RACES YOU NEEDED EDUCATION ON?
Zh: “够了。将C-F类的畸形特征当作笑话太过残忍。你就不想了解一下其他健全的种族了吗？”

En: Isn't the name of your companion Katya?
Zh: “你那位女伴不是叫卡佳吗？”

En: You seem kinda blue about this, Measurehead.
Zh: “你对此好像有些忧伤呢，测颅先生。”

En: Yeah, I'm not gonna bring this up.
Zh: 我还是别提这茬了。

En: Of course. Very tactical. This leads to dangerous places...
Zh: 不错，很高明，这个话题颇有风险。

En: Potato coloured hair, random coloured eyes... (Nod toward Measurehead's woman.)
Zh: “土豆色的头发，杂色的眼睛……”（朝着测颅先生的女人点点头。）

En: He does not seem angry, nor does the woman look affected. She just twirls her hair. Perhaps they've been through this and established an accord?
Zh: 他看起来并没有生气，那个女人也无动于衷，只是在继续捻弄自己的头发。也许他们已经讨论到这个问题并达成了某种共识？

En: YOU UNDERSTAND *NOTHING*. TO SOLVE THE GREAT *RACE ENIGMA* YOU HAVE TO FIRST ASK YOURSELF: WHAT *IS* THE RACE ENIGMA? YOU HAVE NOT EVEN WORDED THE MYSTERY, LET ALONE SOLVED IT.
Zh: “你太过*无知*了。想破解伟大的*种族之谜*之前，你必须先问问自己：种族之谜究竟*是*什么？你现在都无法用言语去描述谜题本身，更别提要去破解这一谜题了。”

En: Will you help me get that body down if I do?
Zh: “如果我可以做到的话，你会帮我把尸体弄下来吗？”

En: Will you let me into the harbour if I do?
Zh: “如果我可以做到的话，你会放我进港口吗？”

En: How do I word the Mystery? (Accept.)
Zh: “我该如何用言语去描述谜题呢？”（接受。）

En: On second thought, I don't have time to get any deeper into this stuff. (Decline.)
Zh: “转念一想，我没时间继续深入这个话题。”（拒绝。）

En: WE WILL SEE.
Zh: “看情况吧。”

En: YOU NEED TO *INTERNALIZE* WHAT YOU HAVE HEARD HERE TODAY. THEN RETURN TO ME -- THIS CLARITY DOES NOT COME INSTANTLY.
Zh: “你需要把今天在这里听到的一切都*内化*，然后再回我这里——参悟不是一蹴而就的事情。”

En: LOST DOE, BUCKLED AWAY AT THE LAST GATE -- THIS IS WHY YOUR HAPLOGROUP WILL NEVER RISE FROM THE ASHES. NOW -- I NEED TO LUXURIATE IN THE PRIVATE COMPANY OF MY BABE. LEAVE ME.
Zh: “迷失的小白兔啊，在最后一关门口投降了——这就是你所在的单倍群无法浴火重生的原因。现在——我要尽情享受我的宝贝的陪伴了，你走吧。”

En: Access to the Union is important for our investigation, but there may be another way in... Without becoming a race theoretician.
Zh: “进入工会的区域对于我们的调查至关重要，不过可能还有别的办法可以进去……在不成为一个种族理论家的前提下。”

En: Let's go over that funky race classification again.
Zh: “我们再复习一次那个酷炫的种族分类吧。”

En: THERE IS NOTHING *FUNKY* ABOUT THEM: THERE ARE THREE CATEGORIES OF RACE: TYPE A, TYPE B, AND THE VILE C-F RACE CAULDRON OF PEDERASTY. WHICH ONE DO YOU NEED?
Zh: “种族分类毫无*酷炫*可言。种族一共有三类：A类——英雄种族，B类——奴隶种族，以及肮脏的C-F类——鸡奸者的大染缸。你想了解哪一类？”

En: Let's discuss something else.
Zh: “我们聊点别的吧。”

En: I CANNOT POSSIBLY IMAGINE WHAT ELSE WE HAVE TO DISCUSS, TYPE B REVACHOLIAN -- YOUR LOVE FOR DISCO MUSIC AND VENEREAL DISEASE?
Zh: “我不知道我跟你还有什么别的可聊的，B类的瑞瓦肖人——难不成要聊你喜欢的迪斯科和花柳病吗？”

En: AND?
Zh: “所以呢？”

En: This *racecraft* is what rich people want us to do while they get all the money.
Zh: “有钱人就希望我们进行*种族建构*，然后把钱全部留给他们。”

En: Paradoxically, you plan to supersede the Occidenals with their own race theory.
Zh: “自相矛盾的是，你虽说想要取代奥西登人，用的却是他们的种族理论。”

En: It's just something you shock people with. Liberal and progressives people.
Zh: “这种东西让特别唬人，特别是对于自由主义者和进步人士来说。”

En: This dump is ready to be superseded by the Areopagite superstate. I can serve as a clerk in your administration -- maybe you need a cop.
Zh: “这群垃圾即将被艾瑞奥帕吉特超国家所取代。我可以继续在你们的政府里当个公务员——也许你们也用得上警察呢。”

En: It's shit. I just wanted to get into the harbour.
Zh: “放你的狗屁，我只想进港口。”

En: It's shit. Let me into the fucking harbour.
Zh: “放你的狗屁，赶快他妈的放我进港口。”

En: LOOK, BABE. THE DISCO DANCING DEGENERATE HAS RUN OUT OF COCAINE TO SHOOT INTO HIS ARMS. THIS HAS MADE HIM SHORT FUSED AND IMPOLITE. UNDERNEATH THE POSTURING, THERE IS DREAD.
Zh: “看到了吗，宝贝，这个跳迪斯科舞的垃圾已经没可卡因可用了，所以变得暴躁而且粗鲁，虚张声势地想要隐藏恐惧。”

En: EVERYONE CAN SEE THAT. IT HAS LITTLE TO DO WITH THE *RACE ENIGMA*.
Zh: “这一点是个人都懂，这跟*种族之谜*没多大关系。”

En: It's whatever you want it to be. It's a free association language exercise: degenerate, race hero...
Zh: “你说什么就是什么。这不过是组词造句训练罢了：劣等，种族英雄……”

En: LOOK, BABE. THE RICH-MAN HAS HUMILIATED AND EMASCULATED THIS *COPLET*. HE CAN ONLY THINK IN BASE MATERIALIST CATEGORIES AND FEMININE ABSTRACTIONS LIKE MONEY.
Zh: “看啊，宝贝。有钱人非但羞辱了这个*小警察*，还把他给阉了，他就只会拿物质基础之类的唯物主义归类法还有金钱这样的娘炮概念去思考。”

En: LOOK, BABE, THE MINION OF LAW IS ALSO A RACIST. BUT HIS RACISM IS BASIC AND ROTE. HE THINKS HE HAS SOLVED THE GREAT RACE *ENIGMA* BY DESCRIBING A ROTE MECHANISM OF SCIENTIFIC COMPETITION.
Zh: “看啊，宝贝，这个法律的爪牙居然也是个种族主义者，但他所掌握的种族主义原始且生硬。他以为光生搬一套科学竞争机制就能破解伟大的*种族之谜*。”

En: LOOK BABE, THE PETULANT DISCO DISSIDENT THINKS RACIAL SYNTHESIS EXISTS TO *RANKLE* HIS SENSIBILITIES. IN HIS SHALLOW HALL-OF-MIRRORS EXISTENCE, EVERYTHING IS INSINCERE -- EVEN NATURE.
Zh: “看啊，宝贝，这个暴躁的迪斯科异议分子觉得种族混合理论之所以存在就是为了让他*愤愤不平*。在他自我存在的镜厅中，一切都是虚伪的——对他来说甚至连自然都是虚伪的。”

En: LOOK BABE, THE PETULANT ROCK AND ROLL REBEL THINKS THE RACIAL SYNTHESIS EXISTS TO *RANKLE* HIS SENSIBILITIES. IN HIS HALL-OF-MIRRORS EXISTENCE, EVERYTHING IS INSINCERE -- EVEN NATURE.
Zh: “看啊，宝贝，这个暴躁的摇滚叛逆者觉得种族混合理论之所以存在就是为了让他*愤愤不平*。在他自我存在的镜厅中，一切都是虚伪的——对他来说甚至连自然都是虚伪的。”

En: LOOK BABE, WHEN CONFRONTED WITH THE HARSH TRUTH OF HIS DEMISE THE MELANCHOLIC ACADEMICIAN STARTS FIDDLING HIS OWN GENITALIA. HIS BALD SPOT BETRAYS THAT HE IS A COMPULSIVE MASTURBATOR.
Zh: “看啊，宝贝，一旦要面对他终将毁灭的残酷真相时，这位忧郁的学者就开始拨弄自己的生殖器官了。他寸草不生的头顶暴露了他是强迫性自慰者这一真相。”

En: It's about you being conflicted about your *Kojka* girlfriend, isn't it?
Zh: “你对你的*克吉卡*女朋友感到矛盾吧？”

En: LOOK, BABE, WHEN CONFRONTED WITH THE DEMISE OF HIS ENTIRE RACE, THE BOURGEOIS ALCOHOLIC DEGENERATE FOCUSES ON GOSSIP. OTHER PEOPLE'S LIVES ARE A REFUGE FOR HIM -- FROM THE BURNING RACE WRECKAGE OF HIS OWN.
Zh: “看啊，宝贝，一旦要面对他整个种族终将毁灭的残酷真相时，这位下贱的资产阶级酒鬼就开始关注八卦了。他寸草不生的头顶暴露了他是强迫性自慰者这一真相。”

En: He turns to you. "YOU COULD HAVE USED THIS OPPORTUNITY TO OVERCOME YOUR NARROW, *AL GUL* RAVAGED IDENTITY. INSTEAD OF UNLOCKING THE RACE ENIGMA, YOU ATTEMPTED TO *ADD* TO IT -- UNSUCCESSFULLY."
Zh: 他转向你。“你本来可以利用这次机会克服自己狭隘的、被*己戊*蹂躏的身份认同。而你非但并没能解开种族之谜，反而还企图*增加*让谜题更加难解——而且还没能得逞。”

En: Rich man really fucked him over, Jean. The woman looks half-bored.
Zh: “有钱人真的把他玩坏了，让。”女人看起来有些失了兴致。

En: HIS RAGE IS ALREADY PLAYED OUT ON THE STAGE OF HISTORY -- AS THE GROTESQUE TRAGEDY OF REVOLUTION. ALL IT CAN ACCOMPLISH NOW IS IMPOTENT ACADEMIC TEXT AND NEUROSYPHILITIC ROCK AND ROLL MELANCHOLIA.
Zh: “他的愤怒早已被历史淘汰——就像大革命的荒诞悲剧一样。这种愤怒唯一能带来的只有阳痿的学术论文和神经性梅毒的摇滚忧郁症。”

En: He turns to you. "IMPOTENT CLASS WARRIOR, I TAKE PITY ON YOU. YOU CLEARLY WANT TO ENTER THE HARBOUR BAD. LIKE A LITTLE BOY WHO WANTS TO GO ON THE POTTY. I CAN PRESS THE BUTTON FOR YOU -- IT WILL OPEN THE DOOR."
Zh: 他转向你。“阳痿的阶级战士啊，我怜悯你，你显然真的很想进入这个港口，就像一个急着要上厕所的小男孩。我可以为你按下按钮——大门接着就会打开。”

En: That's all I wanted.
Zh: “我想要的就是这个。”

En: I don't need your pity. The working class will rise in a sea of blood and you and your rich-boy master will drown in it. [Leave.]
Zh: “我不需要你的怜悯。工人阶级将从血海中站起，而你和你那有钱的主子则会在溺死在里面。”[离开。]

En: LOOK, BABE. THE FOSSILIZED ROCK AND ROLL REBEL CHALLENGES ME -- A FIGURE OF AUTHORITY. HE IS TRYING TO REINSTATE HIS INDIVIDUALISM WITH SWEARWORDS TAKEN FROM ROCK SONGS FROM THE LAST CENTURY.
Zh: “看啊，宝贝。这个化石一样的摇滚叛逆者想挑战我——权威的化身。他想用上个世纪摇滚乐里学到的脏话来为他的个人主义招魂。”

En: Coca has really fucked him over, Jean. The woman looks half-bored.
Zh: “可卡因真的把他玩坏了，让。”女人看起来有些失了兴致。

En: Individualism has really fucked him over, Jean. The woman looks half-bored.
Zh: “个人主义真的把他玩坏了，让。”女人看起来有些失了兴致。

En: He turns to you. "IMPOTENT SUBJECT OF POP CULTURE, I TAKE PITY ON YOU. YOU CLEARLY WANT TO ENTER THE HARBOUR BAD -- LIKE A LITTLE BOY WANTS TO GO ON THE POTTY. I CAN PRESS THE BUTTON FOR YOU -- IT WILL OPEN THE DOOR."
Zh: 他转向你。“流行文化阳痿的奴隶啊，我怜悯你，你显然真的很想进入这个港口，就像一个急着要上厕所的小男孩。我可以为你按下按钮——大门接着就会打开。”

En: That's all I wanted.
Zh: “我想要的就是这个。”

En: I don't need your button. I will enter the harbour on my own terms. [Leave.]
Zh: “我不需要你摁按钮，我会以我自己的方式进入港口。”[离开。]

En: VERY WELL. YOU MAY ENTER THE DOOR *ONCE*. He punches the emergency button with his fist. "OUR RACE CONVERSATION HERE HAS CONCLUDED."
Zh: “很好，*这次*就让你进去，”他用拳头砸向紧急按钮。“我们的对话就到此为止。”

En: I knew he wouldn't get it, Jean. The woman looks half-bored. "He's like a cop or something."
Zh: “我就知道他不会明白的，让。”女人看上去有点失了兴致,“他是个警察什么的。”

En: He turns to you. "DEGENERATE SOCIAL DEMOCRAT, I TAKE PITY ON YOU. YOU CLEARLY WANT TO ENTER THE HARBOUR BAD. LIKE A LITTLE BOY WHO WANTS TO GO ON THE POTTY. I CAN PRESS THE BUTTON FOR YOU -- IT WILL OPEN THE DOOR."
Zh: 他转向你。“阳痿的社会民主主义者啊，我怜悯你，你显然真的很想进入这个港口，就像一个急着要上厕所的小男孩。我可以为你按下按钮——大门接着就会打开。”

En: That's all I wanted.
Zh: “我想要的就是这个。”

En: I don't need your pity. And you misunderstood me, I'm not a liberal, I just... am I a liberal? [Leave.]
Zh: “我不需要你的怜悯。还有你误解我了，我才不是自由主义者，我只是……我算是自由主义者吗？”[离开。]

En: YOU THINK HE IS AN OLD MAN, BUT INSIDE HE IS A TEENAGER, WHO ONLY SEES HIMSELF IN THE MIRROR. *TRUTH* IS STANDING IN THE EYES OF HIS LIBERAL CLIQUE, *ORGANISM* IS A SPECTACLE FOR THE *RRC RADIO 1 MORNING SHOW*.
Zh: “你以为他是个老头，但在内心深处他还只是个少年，只看得到镜子里的自己。*真相*就站在他的自由主义小团体眼前，*高潮*则是*RRC电台1套早间节目*的盛典。”

En: TAKE SOLACE FROM THE FACT THAT THESE THOUGHTS... He points to your head. "WILL *NEVER* ENTIRELY LEAVE YOUR BRAIN. THEY WILL BE WITH YOU ON THE DAY YOU DIE -- THE ONLY GERM OF HEROISM IN YOUR BODY. NOW GO, I HAVE BEAUTY AND TRUTH TO DISCUSS WITH MY WOMAN."
Zh: “你应该感到安慰——这些想法……”他指着你的脑袋，“将*永远都不会*彻底离开你的大脑，直到你死去的那天都会陪伴着你——那是你体内唯一的英雄气概的胚芽。走吧，我还有关于美丽与真理的话题需要跟我的女人讨论。”

En: Damn, Jean, how are you so romantic... the woman swoons.
Zh: “讨厌，让，你怎么这么浪漫啊……”女人迷醉了。

En: That's disgusting, Jean. The woman's young face crumples up in displeasure.
Zh: “好恶心哦，让。”女人那张年轻的脸庞不悦地皱作一团。

En: IT IS. BENEATH THE VENEER OF ACADEMIC JARGON THE LIBERAL THEORIST IS A BEAST, A SEXUAL MANIAC AND A DEPRAVED NIHILIST. LIFE IS A *GAME* TO HIM. WORDS ARE MEANINGLESS. NO ONE IS ACCOUNTABLE FOR ANYTHING.
Zh: “是的。在学术语言的面具之下，这位自由主义理论家就是一头野兽，一个性变态，一个腐化的虚无主义者。对于他来说，生活是一场*游戏*，言语毫无意义，没人需要对任何事情负责。”

En: He turns to you. "NIHILISTIC SEX MANIAC, I TAKE PITY ON YOUR URGES. YOU CLEARLY WANT TO ENTER THE HARBOUR *BAD,* LIKE A LITTLE BOY WHO WANTS TO GO ON THE POTTY. I CAN PRESS THE BUTTON FOR YOU -- IT WILL OPEN THE DOOR."
Zh: 他转向你。“虚无主义的性变态啊，我怜悯你急迫的心情，你显然真的很想进入这个港口，就像一个急着要上厕所的小男孩。我可以为你按下按钮——大门接着就会打开。”

En: So un-advanced... The woman looks half-bored.
Zh: “真是太落后了……”女人看上去有点失了兴致。

En: THE BASIC RACE EDUCATION HE RECEIVED IN HIGH SCHOOL HAS LED HIM TO THINK HIS PHYLUM ARE THE SOLE AUTHORS OF RACE THEORY -- AN ESOTERIC STUDY REACHING BACK TO THE ANCIENT MASS SOCIETY OF PERIKARNASSIS, OVER 4,500 YEARS AGO.
Zh: “他在中学阶段接受的基础种族教育让他误以为自己的体系就是唯一的种族理论——更加深奥的学说可以追溯到4500年前古佩里卡纳西斯的平民社会。”

En: He turns to you. "BASIC RACIST, I TAKE PITY ON YOU. YOU CLEARLY WANT TO ENTER THE HARBOUR BAD. LIKE A LITTLE BOY WHO WANTS TO GO ON THE POTTY. I CAN PRESS THE BUTTON FOR YOU -- IT WILL OPEN THE DOOR."
Zh: 他转向你。“低阶的种族主义者啊，我怜悯你，你显然真的很想进入这个港口，就像一个急着要上厕所的小男孩。我可以为你按下按钮——大门接着就会打开。”

En: I'm not a racist and I don't need your help. [Leave.]
Zh: “我不是种族主义者，也不需要你的帮助。”[离开。]

En: That's all I wanted.
Zh: “我想要的就是这个。”

En: That's all I wanted.
Zh: “我想要的就是这个。”

En: I'm not a depraved maniac, I was just making an observation. Forget it, I will get into the harbour some other way. [Leave.]
Zh: “我才不是腐化的疯子，我只是想观察一下。算了，我会用其他办法进入港口的。”[离开。]

En: That's just tactless, Jean. The woman doesn't even look at you.
Zh: “那真是太蠢了，让。”女人甚至都懒得看你。

En: He turns to you. "EFFEMINATE GOSSIP-MONGERER, I TAKE PITY ON YOUR TABLOID DRIVEN URGES. YOU CLEARLY WANT TO ENTER THE HARBOUR *BAD*, LIKE A LITTLE BOY WHO WANTS TO GO ON THE POTTY. I CAN PRESS THE BUTTON FOR YOU -- IT WILL OPEN THE DOOR."
Zh: 他转向你。“娘炮的绯闻男孩啊，我怜悯你想要八卦的冲动，你显然真的*很想*进入这个港口，就像一个急着要上厕所的小男孩。我可以为你按下按钮——大门接着就会打开。”

En: Baby, don't be mean, The woman pleads with Measurehead. "Give him another chance."
Zh: “宝贝，别那么小气，”女人向测颅先生恳求。“再给他一次机会嘛。”

En: ANYTHING FOR YOU, BABE. He looks to a space right above your head and gestures you to speak.
Zh: “既然你都这么说了，宝贝。”他看向你的头顶上方，示意你接着往下说。

En: Was there an out of this for you with success. Or was the rhetoric game rigged? I can't tell...
Zh: 还有什么致胜的办法吗？还是说这场修辞的游戏一直都在被人操控？我也说不准。

En: I don't know about the rest, but it's clear I should stop drinking the ancient Iilmaraan mind poison Al Gul.
Zh: “其他的我不知道，但是有一点很清楚——我不能再喝古伊尔玛精神毒药*己戊*了。”

En: FASCINATING... The phrenologic lines on his face move like a puzzle board: "THE REVACHOLIAN DEGENERATE SHOWS SIGNS OF RACIAL SELF REFLECTION. HOW DID YOU ACCOMPLISH THIS LITTLE FEAT?"
Zh: “非常好……”他脸上的骨相线条像拼图一样移动着：“劣等的瑞瓦肖人似乎开始进行种族反省了。你是如何达成这个小小奇迹的？”

En: Jean baby -- do the heroic thing.
Zh: “亲爱的让——来次英雄之举吧。”

En: I sobered up for five minutes.
Zh: “我醒了五分钟的酒。”

En: I imagined the pyknic face of the desert pygmee laughing at me, crooked teeth grinning.
Zh: “我脑海中浮现出沙漠侏儒正在嘲笑我的那张肥脸以及那一口歪七扭八的牙齿。”

En: It's always been 100% clear to me that the answer to the race enigma is: I should stop drinking.
Zh: “我心里一直百分百地清楚种族之谜的答案是什么：我该戒酒了。”

En: AND, OF COURSE, YOU WILL NOT BE ABLE TO FREE YOURSELF FROM THE YOKE OF *GUL*. IT IS TOO LATE. IT MAY BE LETHAL TO STOP AT THIS POINT, BUT STILL... He pauses in heroic doubt.
Zh: “还有，很显然你已经没办法从*己戊*的束缚中解脱出来了。一切都太迟了，在现在戒酒可能是致命的，不过……”他停顿了一下，英雄般地起了疑心。

En: First of all, I *will* stop drinking.
Zh: “首先，我*会*戒酒的。”

En: Now open the doors, I need to talk to Evrart about getting that body down.
Zh: “现在把门打开吧，我需要跟艾弗拉特聊聊把尸体弄下来的事。”

En: Now open the doors, I need to talk to your boss.
Zh: “现在把门打开吧，我需要跟你的老大聊聊。”

En: IF THE REVACHOLIAN DEGENERATE IS CAPABLE OF CRITICAL THOUGHT HE MAY STILL PROVE A *RACE ADVERSARY* -- WHY SHOULD I HELP MY ADVERSARY? He looks at the red button, seeking council from his own ideals.
Zh: “如果劣等的瑞瓦肖人真的有能力进行批判性思维的话，他也许还能证明自己配得上当我的*种族对手*——我为何要帮助我的对手呢？”他看着红色按钮，想从自己的理想中找寻建言。

En: SO IT WOULD SEEM, THRALL OF GUL -- I FIND MYSELF AT A CROSSROADS. ON ONE HAND, THIS PATHETIC SELF-THERAPY HAS LITTLE TO DO WITH THE GREAT MYSTERY OF LIVING ORGANISMS, THE RACE ENIGMA...
Zh: “己戊的贱奴啊，我发现自己正处于两难的境地。一方面，你这种可悲的自疗与种族之谜没有多大关联……”

En: Your willpower fires up. Directing you to speak...
Zh: 你的意志力被点燃了，你在它的催促下开了口……

En: THAT IS NOT POSSIBLE. THE GAME OF *SHAH-MAT* YOU PLAY AGAINST THE GUL'S TRICKS IS UNWINNABLE. THE DAYS, THE WEEKS, THE MONTHS WILL WEAR YOU OUT. THE OCCIDENTAL HAPLOGROUP IS INCAPABLE OF LONG TERM LUCID THOUGHT.
Zh: “这不可能。在这场与己戊的棋局中你是不可能获胜的，每过一天，每过一个星期，每过一个月你的精力随时都会耗尽。奥西登单倍群无法进行长期清醒的思考。”

En: It's super hard, Jean. The woman looks at her fingernails. "My mom couldn't do it either."
Zh: “真的特别难，”女人看着自己的手指甲。“我妈也做不到。”

En: VERY WELL, YOU MAY ENTER *ONCE*. He punches the emergency button with his fist. "OUR CONVERSATION HERE HAS CONCLUDED."
Zh: “很好，*这次*就让你进去，”他用拳头砸向紧急按钮。“我们的对话就到此为止。”

En: You're wrong. I'll do it. I'm quitting!
Zh: “你错了，我会做到的。我已经在戒了！”

En: YOU WILL NOT. YOU CANNOT WITHSTAND THE WASTE LAND OF REALITY.
Zh: “不可能。你根本无法与现实的荒原抗衡。”

En: NO.
Zh: 不。

En: Well done. The lieutenant impatiently gestures toward the door. "Let's go."
Zh: “做得好。”警督不耐烦地指了指大门，“咱们走。”

En: Finally. The lieutenant impatiently gestures toward the door. "Let's go."
Zh: “总算。”警督不耐烦地指了指大门，“咱们走。”

En: I imagined a woman, laughing at me beneath her pity. Terrible and beautiful.
Zh: “我脑海中浮现出一个怜悯地嘲笑着我的女人，可怕而又美丽。”

En: SO IT WOULD SEEM, THRALL OF GUL. ON ONE HAND, THIS PATHETIC SELF-THERAPY HAS LITTLE TO DO WITH THE GREAT MYSTERY OF LIVING ORGANISMS, THE RACE ENIGMA...
Zh: “己戊的贱奴啊，我发现自己正处于两难的境地。一方面，你这种可悲的自疗与种族之谜没有多大关联……”

En: AND, OF COURSE, YOU WILL NOT BE ABLE TO FREE YOURSELF FROM THE YOKE OF *GUL*. IT IS TOO LATE. IT MAY BE LETHAL TO STOP AT THIS POINT, BUT STILL... He pauses in heroic doubt.
Zh: “还有，很显然你已经没办法从*己戊*的束缚中解脱出来了。一切都太迟了，在现在戒酒可能是致命的，不过……”他停顿了一下，英雄般地起了疑心。

En: Your willpower fires up. Directing you to speak...
Zh: 你的意志力被点燃了，它催促你开了口……

En: IF THE REVACHOLIAN DEGENERATE IS CAPABLE OF CRITICAL THOUGHT HE MAY PROVE A *RACE ADVERSARY* YET -- WAS I MISTAKEN TO SHARE THE ESOTERIC SCIENCE WITH HIM?
Zh: “如果劣等的瑞瓦肖人真的有能力进行批判性思维的话，他也许还能证明自己配得上当我的*种族对手*——我是不是不该将这些深奥的科学原理拿出来与他分享？”

En: Jean, baby -- you did the heroic thing.
Zh: “让，宝贝——你是个英雄。”

En: I *will* stop drinking.
Zh: “我*会*戒酒的。”

En: It's super hard Jean. The woman looks at her fingernails. "My mom couldn't do it either."
Zh: “真的特别难，”女人看着自己的手指甲。“我妈也做不到。”

En: THAT IS NOT POSSIBLE. THE GAME OF *SHAH-MAT* YOU PLAY AGAINST THE GUL'S TRICKS IS UNWINNABLE. THE DAYS, THE WEEKS, THE MONTHS WILL WEAR YOU OUT. THE OCCIDENTAL HAPLOGROUP IS INCAPABLE OF LONG TERM LUCID THOUGHT.
Zh: “这不可能。在这场与己戊的棋局中你是不可能获胜的，每过一天，每过一个星期，每过一个月你都迟早会筋疲力尽。奥西登单倍群无法进行长期清醒的思考。”

En: You're wrong. I'll do it. I'm quitting!
Zh: “你错了，我会做到的。我已经在戒了！”

En: NO.
Zh: 不。

En: YOU WILL NOT. YOU CANNOT WITHSTAND THE WASTE LAND OF REALITY.
Zh: “不可能。你根本无法与现实的荒原抗衡。”

En: You're right. Who am I kidding. Without party time, grey reality is devoid of reason.
Zh: “你说得对，我瞒得过所有人也瞒不过你。要是没了派对时间，灰色的现实也就失去了理性。”

En: THAT IS RIGHT. YOU CANNOT WITHSTAND THE WASTE LAND OF REALITY.
Zh: “的确，你根本无法与现实的荒原抗衡。”

En: Let's go, officer. The lieutenant puts his hand on your shoulder. "Let's go do some work."
Zh: “我们走吧，警官。”警督把手搭在你的肩膀上。“我们去干活吧。”

En: Perhaps we should go and do some work now?
Zh: “咱们是不是该去干活了？”

En: The crackle of bones, inside... you can hear it.
Zh: 里面传来骨头碎裂的声音……你能听见。

En: THE WORDS TO THE SONG HAVE CHANGED. SAY: 'I AM A VIOLENT DRUNK.'
Zh: “歌词现在改了。快说：‘我是个暴力的醉汉。’”

En: The man is reeling, gasping for air, time stands still around you. In the distance the sounds of the harbour are falling silent.
Zh: 他步履蹒跚、气喘吁吁，你周围的时间静止了。远处港口传来的声音渐渐平静。

En: That fighting pose -- watch out, he's *expecting* the hook!
Zh: 那个战斗架势——小心，他正*等*着你出勾拳呢！

En: Looks like you're the new Measurehead now.
Zh: “看来现在你是新一任的测颅先生了。”

En: Yes, that's right. I am the new Measurehead now. [Leave.]
Zh: “是的，没错。现在我就是新一任的测颅先生。”[离开。]

En: No, I just want to get into the harbour so I can do my job. [Leave.]
Zh: “不，我只想进港口去干自己的活。”[离开。]

En: Her voice is surprisingly calm.
Zh: 她的声音出乎意料的平静。

En: How did this happen?! I was winning?
Zh: 怎么会发生这种事？！我本来不是要赢了吗？

En: You were. But then you made a wrong move. And now your skull feels like it's about to crack.
Zh: 是的，不过随后你走错了一步。现在你感觉自己的头骨马上就要裂开了。

En: OUR PERSONAL DYNAMIC HAS CHANGED. He pauses for a second. "A LITTLE."
Zh: “咱俩的实力对比变了。”他停顿了几秒。“一点点。”

En: He means *very* little.
Zh: 他的意思是*非常非常*少。

En: YOUR RACE DESCENT HAS TEMPORARILY HALTED. BUT YOU WILL FALL AGAIN.
Zh: “你们的种族退化暂时停止了，不过很快又会下跌的。”

En: THE UNPROMISING *RACE PUPIL* RETURNS.
Zh: “没前途的*种族学生*回来了。”

En: THE UNPROMISING *RACE PUPIL* RETURNS.
Zh: “没前途的*种族学生*回来了。”

En: I can't figure out the reality rhizome. Can't you just tell me how to turn back time?
Zh: “我不清楚什么现实脉络。你能直接告诉我怎么让时间倒流吗？”

En: I figured out the reality rhizome. Let's talk about turning back time again.
Zh: “我清楚现实脉络。我们还是来谈谈时光倒流的事情吧。”

En: I need to find a way to turn back time.
Zh: “我得找到让时间倒流的方法。”

En: Don't be such an asshole to your fellow dockworker. (Show him the stolen ID card.)
Zh: “对你码头的同事能不能别这么混账。”（把偷来的身份证件那给他看。）

En: The man looks at you, silent and unmoving. His eyes burrow into the remnants of your soul.
Zh: 男人看着你，沉默不语，纹丝不动。他的眼睛在你残存的灵魂中探寻着。

En: YOU ARE NOT SANTIAGO. SANTIAGO IS NOT YOU. EVEN THE PHRENICALLY IMPAIRED CAN SEE THIS.
Zh: “你不是圣地亚哥。圣地亚哥不是你。瞎子都看得出来。”

En: Get him to talk to you in private.
Zh: 让他私下和你交谈。

En: Dresscode: Pseudo-SKULL.
Zh: 着装要求：伪骷髅头。

En: Standard Anti-Wirrâl Die.
Zh: 标准反威勒尔骰子。

En: Talked to Gary
Zh: 和盖理对话。

En: Talked to the lorryman.
Zh: 和货車司机对话。

En: Talked to René.
Zh: 和雷内对话。

En: Let's go, I'm ready to talk in private. (Go to mom's office with him.)
Zh: “走吧，我们准备私下谈谈。”（和他前往妈妈的办公室。）

En: We're gonna miss you, Jean! The babes swoon and sigh as if he's about to leave on an interisolary flight.
Zh: “我们会想你的，让！”那些女人们痴迷地叹着气，仿佛他马上要搭乘跨洲航班飞走一样。

En: You go ahead and have your talk, says the lieutenant, glancing over the railing. "I need a few things from Frittte anyways. We'll catch up later."
Zh: “你先去谈谈吧，”警督瞥了一眼栏杆然后说道。“反正我也要去弗利多那儿买些东西。我们晚点汇合。”

En: THIS WAY, PROCESSED MEAT MAN. He points to the office door behind you.
Zh: “这边，加工肉人。”他指向你身后办公室的门。

En: He couldn't be happier to get out of this conversation.
Zh: 他巴不得能结束这场对话。

En: DON'T WORRY, BABE. THIS WON'T TAKE LONG.
Zh: “别担心，宝贝。不会太久的。”

En: The lieutenant nods, ready to spend some time on his own.
Zh: 警督点点头，准备自己独处一会儿了。

En: Bröther... this one might know how to turn back time.
Zh: 兄弟……这家伙可能知道如何让时间倒流。

En: Don't say anything, size him up first.
Zh: 什么也不要说，先目测一下他的块头。

En: Come on, I just need you to move about twenty centimetres back.
Zh: “拜托，我只需要你往边上移动大概20厘米就行。”

En: Push him out of the way.
Zh: 把他推开。

En: THAT IS RIGHT. He doesn't even flinch. "YOU SHOULD LEAVE THE STAGE OF HISTORY WITH DIGNITY -- BY INVITING THE OTHER RACES TO A *GREAT WORLD WAR*."
Zh: “很好。”他连动都没动。“你们应该以一种体面的方式退出历史舞台——比如邀请其他种族加入一场*世界大战*。”

En: Subscribe to his advanced race theory.
Zh: 同意他的先进种族理论。

En: *Down* with it.
Zh: *接受*它。

En: Tactful in front of the woman.
Zh: 在女人面前耍滑头。

En: Manana's hint.
Zh: 马列拉的提示。

En: Knock him out.
Zh: 把他揍趴下。

En: Volition says do it again!
Zh: 意志力让你再来一遍！

En: Bested him in craniometrics.
Zh: 在颅骨测量学标准上击败他。

En: Lifted some weights in the gym.
Zh: 去健身房撸铁。

En: Suggestion is against it.
Zh: 建议是反对的。

En: Advice from Scab Leader.
Zh: 工贼领袖的建议。

En: Evrart told you to help us get the body down from the tree.
Zh: “艾弗拉特让你帮我们把树上那具尸体弄下来。”

En: BUT -- WHILE I AM GONE SOMEONE MUST STAND GUARD ON THE BRIDGE. THAT SOMEONE NEEDS TO BE *YOU*. He turns to the lieutenant: "BOTH OF YOU."
Zh: “在我离开这里的这段时间必须有人守在桥上，那个人只能是*你*了，”他转向警督，“还有你。”

En: BUT. He leans in and intones: "WHILE I AM GONE SOMEONE MUST STAND GUARD ON THE BRIDGE. THAT SOMEONE NEEDS TO BE *YOU*."
Zh: “但是。”他靠了过来，一字一句道，“在我离开这里的这段时间必须有人守在桥上，那个人只能是*你*了。”

En: She turns to you. "So, you guys are like cops or something?"
Zh: 她转向你。“所以，你们是警察还是怎么的？”

En: Yeah, we're the Law around here.
Zh: “是啊，我们是这儿的法律。”

En: You hear that? The lieutenant looks toward the yard. "That sound. He's *breaking* something."
Zh: “你听见了吗？”警督看向院子的方向。“他正在*破坏*什么。”

En: Apparently so.
Zh: “显然是这样没错。”

En: The man turns to look behind him -- at the behemoth appearing around the corner, approaching him, walking past him...
Zh: 男人回头看了看身后——转角处出现一个庞然大物，向他走来，然后从他身边经过……

En: Yes, I am an unbelievably corrupt cop. I am corrupt every opportunity I get.
Zh: “是的，我是个腐败至极的警察。我只要一逮到机会就会贪污。”

En: Look at you, RCM rent-a-cops! A loud voice booms in from below: "Guarding that bridge like Evrart's lapdogs, is this where it's at now? The RCM is for sale?"
Zh: “看看你，RCM的保安！”下方传来一个很大的声音，“像艾弗拉特的狗似的守在桥上，所以世道已经成这样了吗？RCM也可以拿钱收买了吗？”

En: THE CORPSE HAS BEEN REMOVED FROM THE TREE. He brushes wooden flakes off his hands: "STAND DOWN AND CONGRATULATE YOURSELF. YOU HAVE SIDED WITH RACE VICTORY TODAY."
Zh: “尸体已经从树上弄下来了。”他拍掉手上的木屑。“现在退下，然后弹冠相庆吧，今天你站在了胜利种族这一边。”

En: I'll work with whoever I want.
Zh: “我想跟谁合作就跟谁合作。”

En: Cool. I like men with guns and power. The woman twirls her hair. "I'm Katya by the way..."
Zh: “酷。我喜欢既有枪又有种的男人。”女人捻弄着自己的头发。“顺便说一句，我叫卡佳。”

En: The man is still knocked out. He breathes slowly and steadily.
Zh: 男人仍处于昏迷状态，他的呼吸缓慢而沉稳。

En: It'll take a few moments for him to recover.
Zh: 他可能还要一会儿才能缓过来。

En: DO NOT PRESUME THIS HAS DRASTICALLY ALTERED OUR RACE DYNAMIC.
Zh: “别以为这样就能彻底改变我们种族之间的实力对比。”

En: TRUE. I SAID NOTHING ABOUT OUR PERSONAL DYNAMIC -- THAT HAS ALTERED. He adds: "A LITTLE."
Zh: “但有关我们之间个人的实力对比就是另一回事了——这一方面确实发生了变化。”他补了一句：“一点点。”

En: [Leave.]
Zh: [离开。]

En: Please, stop doing this. You're making us look bad.
Zh: “求你了，停手吧，你这样下去只让咱俩难堪。”

En: Just try again. This is one of those things where the wise sage wants you to exhibit perseverance.
Zh: 再试一次。古往今来的智者都鼓励人在这样的时刻不气不馁。

En: Go ahead, don't be shy. Just ask for race secrets.
Zh: 来吧，不要害羞，问他种族秘密的事。

En: Ask what kind of races are there first. Classification is core to this stuff.
Zh: 先问问有哪些种族。种族分类至关重要。

En: I knocked you out like a god of martial arts.
Zh: “我就像战神附体一般把你击倒了。”

En: It was just something I had to do.
Zh: “我只是必须这么做。”

En: Just like that, instinct took over -- a solid strike straight into his throat, into the cartilage! You could swear you felt the soft palate break...
Zh: 就像刚才那样，本能占了上风——在他的喉咙上结结实实的一击，拳头陷进了软骨！你可以对天发誓你感觉到他的软组织已经碎了……

En: How did this happen? Your little fist is in his giant hand and he's squeezing it. It hurts...
Zh: 这是怎么了？你的小拳头正被他巨大的手掌攥着，他正用力挤压着。好疼……

En: *ANOTHER* FIT OF CRIMINAL RAGE. The pressure on your already broken hand hand becomes unbearable: "WHO ARE YOU? IN YOUR OWN WORDS?"
Zh: “*又是*罪犯的情绪冲动。”就快折断的手上传来的压力变得有些难以承受。“你是谁？用你自己的话，快说。”

En: YOU MUST BE OUT OF YOUR MIND, DEGENERATE DRUNK. The pressure on your hand becomes unbearable. "SAY IT: *I AM A DEGENERATE ALCOHOLIC*."
Zh: “你一定是疯了，下贱的醉鬼。”包裹着拳头的压力已经大到难以承受。“快说：”*我是个下贱的酒鬼*。”

En: Don't say it. You're not a degenerate alcoholic, you're a cop and a hero.
Zh: 别说。你不是下贱的酒鬼，你是名警察，是一个英雄。

En: D-d-d-degenerate alcoholic!\n
Zh: “西——西——西——下贱的酒鬼！”

En: I... am... a... a degenerate al... alcoholic.
Zh: “我……是……一个……一个下贱的酒……酒鬼。”

En: I don't remember, please...
Zh: “求你了，我不记得了……”

En: F... d... dfuck you!
Zh: “我……他妈的……操你大爷！”

En: I'm a... cop.
Zh: “我是一个……警察。”

En: I'm a hero....
Zh: “我是个英雄……”

En: Help!
Zh: “救命！”

En: GOOD. He releases your hand. "NOW LEAVE, BEFORE YOU HUMILIATE YOUR HOMO-EROTIC ORGANISATION ANY FURTHER."
Zh: “很好。”他松开你的手。“现在走吧，别继续再给自己的同性变态组织丢脸了。”

En: Your fist cracks in his hand like a ripe apple. Pain shoots up into your brain as he's twisting it more and more:
Zh: 你的拳头就像一个熟透的苹果在他掌中碎裂。疼痛感迅速传入你的大脑，他还在继续不停地扭动着你的手：

En: Your hand cracks and twists in his grasp but your body is too numb with adrenaline to feel it...
Zh: 你碎掉的拳头被他拧成了麻花，但你的身体由于肾上腺素而变得麻木，已经感觉不到疼痛了……

En: Your hand twists in his grip and the pain blinds you. Still you press the words out of your swollen mouth...
Zh: 你的手被他拧成了麻花，疼痛蒙住了你的双眼，不过你还是将那句话从肿胀的嘴唇中挤了出来……

En: No. I... won't fucking say anything.
Zh: “不。我……他妈的就不说。”

En: I... am... the law.
Zh: “我……就是……法律。”

En: I am invincible. It doesn't hurt...
Zh: “我是无敌的，根本就不疼……”

En: There's nothing you can do to me... that *treacherous whores* haven't done to me already.
Zh: “你奈何不了我……还有什么手段那个*两面三刀的婊子*没对我使过？”

En: He can't hurt you. What more can he do that you haven't gone through already?
Zh: 他伤不了你。他还能怎么你呢，你什么场面没见过？

En: RABID ANIMAL, YOU SHOULD BE PUT DOWN. He releases your poor hand from his grasp. "I WILL NOT BE THE ONE WHO GETS YOUR STINK ON ME."
Zh: “疯狗，你应该被就地处决。”他松开了你可怜的手。“我可不想脏了自己的手。”

En: All you hear is a small gurgling sound as a trickle of blood appears on the man's lip.
Zh: 只听一阵微弱的咕噜声，一条血迹出现在男人的嘴角。

En: Now's the time for a SPIN KICK! He expects the one-two, not the one-three-sixty!
Zh: 现在是时候来一记旋风腿了！他以为是二连击，而不是360度回旋踢！

En: He's open, rip into him. Right hook. Escalate it, get *intimate* with him... bring the hurt closer!
Zh: 他已经门户大开，攻过去吧。右钩拳，烈火烹油，跟他再*贴近*一些……让痛感再靠近一些！

En: No, don't be a fucking ballerina, rip into him, right hook! Get *intimate* with him... bring the hurt closer!
Zh: 不，别他妈跳芭蕾了，直接怼上去啊。右钩拳！跟他再*贴近*一些……让痛感再靠近一些！

En: (Rip into him with a right hook.)
Zh: （上前一记右钩拳）

En: (Back up and perform a 360° flying spin-kick.)
Zh: （退后一步，然后施展360度飞身回旋踢。）

En: Oh god, wrong move! Your fist is in his hand again, like a pair of forceps crushing you... he has a *monstrous* recovery rate.\n
Zh: 天哪，赌错了！你的拳头又被他的手抓住了，就像被一副钳子紧紧夹着……他的恢复速度简直是*怪物*。

En: Oh god, wrong move! Your head is in his hands, like a pair of forceps crushing you and you can feel every joule...
Zh: 天哪，一着不慎！你的脑袋被他的手摁住了，就像被一副钳子紧夹着，你感觉到每一焦耳能量……

En: YOU KNOW THE WORDS: 'I AM A DEGENERATE DRUNK.'
Zh: “你知道该说什么：‘我是个下贱的醉汉。’”

En: SAY IT: 'I AM A DEGENERATE DRUNK.'
Zh: “快说：‘我是个下贱的醉汉。’”

En: Take the pain, god damn it, at least take that!
Zh: 忍着疼，见鬼，至少要忍着疼！

En: IT MUST BE NEURODEGENERATIVE. YOU NEVER LEARN. He lets go of your head and lets you slump to the ground.
Zh: “这肯定是神经退化造成的，你永远都不懂得吸取教训。”他松开你的脑袋，你重重跌坐在地上。

En: YOU ARE A POOR PLAYER OF PHYSICAL CHESS. He lets go of your head. You slump to the ground.
Zh: “在肉体的棋局里，你是个差劲的棋手。”他松开你的脑袋。你重重跌坐在地上。

En: (Try to somehow wiggle yourself loose from his grasp.)
Zh: （设法挣脱他的束缚。）

En: Assault of a police officer! Help!
Zh: “袭警啦！救命啊！”

En: I.... am a degener... degener... degenerate drunk!
Zh: “我……是一个下……下……下贱的醉鬼！”

En: Never.
Zh: “想都别想。”

En: The compression is unbearable. This is causing some serious damage to whatever precious, gelatinous thing is inside there... your sight turns red.
Zh: 这股握力太可怕了，它正在对某些金贵的凝胶状物造成严重的伤害……你的视野一片血红。

En: Even under the increased force on your skull there is no pain... just the sound of your own blood gushing in there, feeding your mind with oxygen.
Zh: 尽管头骨上的握力正在增加，但你感觉不到疼痛……只能听到自己血液涌入，为你的大脑补充氧气的声音。

En: The man lands with a dull thump, like a broken down puppet of muscles and sinew. For a moment he still tries to keep his head up, dazed eyes looking at you with unimaginable surprise.... To your left is *The Button.*
Zh: 男人砰的一声砸在地上，就像一个坏掉的由肌肉和肌腱组成的木偶。有那么一会儿他还试图硬撑着抬起头，双眼茫然地注视着你，眼神里满是讶异……那个*按钮*就在你的左边。

En: Welcome to Revachol!!
Zh: “欢迎来到瑞瓦肖！！”

En: As you slam your fist on the button the man collapses entirely, his head rolling to the side...
Zh: 你一拳砸下按钮的那一刻，他彻底垮了，头也歪到了一边……

En: (Just press the button.)
Zh: （直接按下按钮。）

En: Disco inferno! (Press the button.)
Zh: “迪斯科炼狱！”（按下按钮。）

En: The end has begun -- I am the lion-headed cavalry. (Press the button.)
Zh: “终章已经开启——吾乃狮头骑兵。”（按下按钮。）

En: I'm so sorry, I didn't want to do this. (Press the button.)
Zh: “对唔住啦，我也不想的。”（按下按钮。）

En: No one is the new Measurehead -- let's go. Before he gets up... The lieutenant makes haste toward the door.
Zh: “没其他人能顶替测颅先生的位置了——我们走吧，趁他还没醒……”警督急忙朝门的方向走去。

En: I... I... I am a violent drunk...
Zh: “我……我……我是个暴力的醉汉……”

En: It has happened *again*! The titan has your fist locked in his hand and he's twisting it...
Zh: *又*来了！巨人用手紧紧地锁住了你的拳头，用力扭转着……

En: GOOD. He releases your small hand. "NOW GO. BEFORE YOU ENTER CARDIAC ARREST."
Zh: “很好。”他松开你的小手。“现在赶紧走吧。免得你的一会心脏骤停。”

En: Try again, punch his lights out with a right hook!
Zh: 再试一次，用右钩拳把他打爆！

En: Bested him in craniometrics.
Zh: 在颅骨测量学上打败他。

En: Lifted some weights in the gym.
Zh: 去健身房撸铁。

En: Suggestion is against it.
Zh: 不建议你这么做。

En: Scab leader's advice.
Zh: 工贼领袖的建议。

En: Volition says do it again.
Zh: 意志力让你再来一遍！

En: Not again... take the pain, god damn it, at least take that!
Zh: 怎么又来了……忍着疼，见鬼，至少要忍着疼！

En: That would mean you're openly showing the people that you're taking the Union's side.
Zh: 那就意味着你将公然表明自己会站在工会这边。
